证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX排放清单中，SO₂、NOₓ和CO₂等大规模燃烧源物种不确定性较小（~30%），而CO、NMVOC和碳质气溶胶等分散源物种不确定性较大（~100%），不同方法估算结果不可直接比较。,理由是提供了关键污染物不确定性的定量分类对比并引用多篇核心文献（Lu2011, Zhao2011等），建议深挖Table 9数据,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['mosaic emission inventory', 'uncertainty propagation', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001300, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为卫星观测HCHO/CHOCHO用于约束NMVOC排放的模型存在显著偏差：MEGANv2.1高估生物源排放30-60%，RETRO清单低估人为源排放13-16%，需考虑非线性化学反应和传输过程的空间偏差。,理由是揭示了关键模型偏差及优化方法（贝叶斯分析/GEOS-Chem），提供源paper_003中可深挖的定量化修正方案。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HCHO column constraint', 'MEGANv2.1 bias', 'Bayesian emission inversion']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A top-down approach, utilizing observed data, has been developed for estimating VOCs emissions. For instance, based on aircraft and ground-based field measurements, the source-receptor relationships algorithm with Lagrangian particle dispersion model (Fang et al., 2016), mixed layer gradient techniques (Mo et al., 2020), eddy covariance flux measurements (Yuan et al., 2015), and box model (Wang et al., 2020) have been employed to complement or verify bottom-up results. However, these approaches do not comprehensively consider the complex nonlinear chemical reactions and transport processes that VOCs undergo in the atmosphere. Formaldehyde (HCHO) and glyoxal (CHOCHO) in the atmosphere serve as crucial oxidization intermediates for various VOCs (Hong et al., 2021; Liu et al., 2012). Satellite-based observations can readily detect their presence in the form of vertical column density (VCD) from space, making them widely utilized for estimating NMVOC emissions. A commonly used approach assumes that the observed HCHO/CHOCHO columns are locally linearly correlated with VOC emission rates (Palmer et al., 2006; Liu et al., 2012). However, this approach does not consider the spatial offset resulting from chemistry reactions and transport processes. Chaliyakunnel et al. (2019) conducted a Bayesian analysis to derive an optimal estimate of VOC emissions using HCHO measurements over the Indian subcontinent. Their results indicated that biogenic VOC emissions modeled by MEGANv2.1 were overestimated by approximately  $30 - 60\\%$ , whereas anthropogenic VOC emissions derived from the RETRO inventory were underestimated by  $13 - 16\\%$ . Cao et al. (2018) employed the GEOS-Chem model and its adjoint, incorporating tropospheric HCHO and CHOCHO column data from the GOME-2A and OMI satellites as constraints, to quantify Chinese NMVOC emissions. They demonstrated a low bias in the MEGAN model, in contrast to the significant overestimation shown in Bauwens et al. (2016), especially in southern China.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002683, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC v1.0提供2008/2010年中国0.25°网格化人为排放数据（含SO2、NOx、VOCs等），与MIX清单和EDGARv4.3互补构建HTAP全球排放,理由是说明排放清单数据源及融合方法，对模型研究有参考价值但无直接观测结果或趋势分析,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC inventory', 'HTAP mosaic', 'MIX harmonization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC is developed by Tsinghua University under an open-access model framework that provides model-ready emission data over China to support chemical transport models and climate models at different spatial resolution and time scale. In the MIX inventory, the MEIC v.1.0 data were used, which contain the anthropogenic emissions of China for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , PMcoarse, BC, and OC for the years 2008 and 2010 with monthly temporal variation at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$ . For India, MIX used the Indian emission inventory provided by ANL (Argonne National Laboratory) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC and REAS2.1 for other species. With the input from different regions, the MIX inventory provided harmonized emission data at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  grid resolution with monthly variation for both 2008 and 2010. The detailed mosaic process of the MIX inventory is documented in Li et al. (2015). Reported emissions from countries which are only partly covered by the MIX, like Russia, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan and Kazakhstan were not taken up in the HTAP inventory and instead gap filling by EDGARv4.3 was used (see Sect. 2.2.4).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Table 1 Regional changes of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and premature deaths attributable to ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "China's vehicle emissions are highly heterogeneous (Deng et al., 2020). Continuous upgrading of vehicle emission standards has resulted in on-road vehicle fleets consisting of at least three emission levels (Deng et al., 2020), thus challenging the accurate estimation of emission characteristics of vehicles. Currently, the most widely used vehicle emission factor dataset is based on the technical guidelines on emission inventory (GEI) released by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment of the People's Republic of China (MEEPRC) in 2014 (MEEPRC, 2014), with testing speeds of  $30 - 35\\mathrm{km / h}$ . In order to eliminate the influences of working conditions on emission factors, we selected vehicle data with the same driving speeds from the annual inspection dataset to derive corresponding vehicle"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003905, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为中国工业源排放清单在国家级(-17~37% SO2不确定区间)、省级(-15~18%)和市级(-17~22%)尺度量化中，发现排放因子是主要误差源，且省级清单PM值远高于其他研究,理由是多尺度定量对比揭示了具体污染物的不确定性范围与地域差异，包含关键数据表格,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['plant-level uncertainty', '95% confidence intervals', 'PM discrepancy']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

To better depict the contribution trends of different OVOC sources, the parameters were normalized (based on'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002899, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2019年深圳OVOCs浓度干季增13%，2015-2019年从30.3ppb降至18.7ppb；人为源贡献占32-51%，污染控制使一次人为源降50-60%但未改善二次生成OVOCs,理由是包含关键数据：长期浓度趋势、季节特征、具体源贡献率及污染控制措施效果，且指出二次污染未受控的核心问题,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['secondary OVOCs formation', 'anthropogenic reduction efficacy', 'photochemical age parameterization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are important precursors and intermediate products of atmospheric photochemical reactions, which can promote the formation of secondary pollutants such as ozone  $(\\mathrm{O}_3)$  and secondary organic aerosol (SOA). However, there have been few studies on the sources of and long-term variation in ambient OVOCs. This study combined sensitive, near real-time measurements of VOCs by proton transfer reaction-mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) with an improved photochemical age parameterization method to quantify daytime sources of OVOCs in an urban atmosphere in China from 2014 to 2019, permitting the observation of the impacts of emission control strategies that were implemented during this period. Temporal variation in six key OVOCs (methanol, acetaldehyde, acetone, methyl ethyl ketone (MEK), formic acid, and acetic acid) were observed. The sum of concentrations of OVOCs was averagely  $13\\%$  higher during the dry season (November to April), when winds transported polluted air masses to Shenzhen from the continent, than during the wet season, and peak diurnal levels occurred during the daytime year-round due to photochemical production and higher daytime anthropogenic emissions. The average dry season concentration of OVOCs declined from a peak of 30.3 ppb in 2015 to 18.7 ppb in 2019. The results of source apportionment showed that primary anthropogenic sources contributed the most to methanol, MEK, and acetic acid  $(32 - 51\\%)$ ; the dominant sources of acetaldehyde and formic acid were both primary and secondary anthropogenic sources; and biomass burning contributed a small fraction  $(5 - 11\\%)$  to the six OVOCs. From 2014 to 2019, contributions from primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased significantly by  $50 - 60\\%$  due to intensive pollution control measures in Shenzhen, whereas pollution control measures had no observable impact on secondary OVOCs, indicating their formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002603, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图2通过频率直方图可视化2014-2020年中国368个城市PM2.5分布，叠加WHO五级空气质量目标线（AQG:5μg/m³至IT-1:35μg/m³），揭示城市达标进展。,理由是核心图表展示全国城市级PM2.5时空演变与WHO标准对比，含定量分层数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 frequency histogram', 'WHO Interim Targets']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/be8162a1-b632-4506-baf9-c0e07d4e90b7/6ddf1e35b2d69f9794bc7a9cd7d5117661b5741e034a018b0fff324f415c2bae.jpg)  \nFig. 2.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  distribution at city-level in 2014 to 2020. The frequency histograms in (a)-(g) denote the frequency distribution of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in 368 cities across mainland China. The dot lines denote the air quality targets of WHO (i.e., IT-1, IT-2, IT-3, IT-4 and AQG of annual mean concentrations of 35, 25, 15, 10, and  $5\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该文本详细描述PTR-MS仪器监测VOCs时的背景信号扣除方法和参数设置,理由是属于实验方法细节，未提供核心污染变化趋势或来源解析结果，与研究主题关联度低,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PTR-MS background subtraction', 'multiple ion detection']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '$(\\sim 10\\%)$  (Zhu et al., 2018). Considering that the inlet loss of each VOC species was not large enough, the data of VOCs have not been corrected in this study. During online monitoring, background signals were detected for 30 out of every 300 scan cycles. The background values were measured by passing ambient air through a platinum-coated wool trap at  $360^{\\circ}\\mathrm{C}$  to remove VOCs from the ambient air without changing the water content before entering the PTR-MS measurement system. The real VOC response signals were obtained by subtracting the background signals from the atmospheric signals of the samples. PTR-MS was performed in multiple ion detection (MID) mode during the observation period, and each cycle scanned multiple selected ions, taking approximately 30 s (Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019), and 1-h averaged data were used for data analysis. The set values for the main instrument parameters during the observation period are shown in Table S2. In addition, the concentration of ambient  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  was measured by a  $49\\mathrm{iO}_3$  analyzer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002970, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为二次人为源对OVOCs贡献稳定主因大气氧化能力增强（珠三角O₃浓度上升）抵消了前体物减排效果，形成动态平衡。,理由是阐明二次生成机制的重要见解，但缺乏具体数值支撑，需结合其他证据构成完整图景。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary anthropogenic sources', 'Atmospheric oxidizing capacity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'sources to OVOCs did not decrease significantly over the six-year study period, which indicated the OVOC formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors. Previous studies have shown that atmospheric oxidizing capacity was strong in the PRD region, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ , one of important atmospheric oxidizing substances, was on the rise in this region in recent years, which may strongly transform VOC to OVOCs and SOA (Wang et al., 2020; Gong et al., 2018; Xue et al., 2014). Therefore, the relatively stable contribution of secondary anthropogenic sources over the six years could be explained by a net effect of the increased atmospheric oxidizing capacity and decreased primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003480, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为1999年清华大学首次在北京监测PM2.5，年均浓度115-127μg/m³，证实PM2.5主要来源于二次气溶胶（铵硝酸盐/硫酸盐、有机气溶胶），单一粉尘控制不足以改善污染。,理由是提供中国PM2.5研究早期关键数据，但未包含新深挖线索或可视化元素。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary aerosols', 'Ammonium nitrate sulfate']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Chinese policymakers took a longer path to recognize issues with  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in comparison with their response to the acid rain issue. The landmark Harvard Six Cities Study for the eastern United States suggested that ambient fine particle exposures—and not exposures of coarse particle fractions—were specifically associated with daily mortality [11], leading to the first  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  NAAQS being established by the US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) in 1997 [12]. Shortly after, researchers in China began to measure ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and analyze their chemical composition. A research group at Tsinghua University pioneered the continuous measurement of ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations in Beijing in 1999, and reported annual average values of between 115 and  $127\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [13]. As opposed to coarser particles, secondary aerosols (e.g., ammonium nitrate and sulfate, and organic aerosols) rather than primary ones were found to be responsible for the majority of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , suggesting that controlling dust emissions alone (which had been ongoing since 1970s) could not sufficiently reduce overall  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是重复paper_012的方法描述且未补充新数据或结论，信息冗余,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'tracked and a detailed Monte-Carlo simulation framework was established, evaluating the uncertainties of emissions from individual plants. At national scale, the uncertainties of emissions of China and Jiangsu were also quantified following the method of our previous work (Zhao et al., 2011). The impacts of various data and methods between multi-scale inventories on the uncertainties of emission estimation are further analyzed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_000596, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为讨论NMOGs（涵盖VOCs/OVOCs/IVOCs）的术语定义演变，侧重概念范围而非实证研究。,理由是术语解释性内容无实测数据或模型，与研究主题关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['NMOG definition', 'Volatility-based speciation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'defines VOCs as any compound that participates in atmospheric photochemical reactions except for those that they designate as having minimal reactivity. The term oxygenated VOC (OVOC) (Goldstein and Galbally, 2007; Kwan et al., 2006) has further blurred these definitions, with colloquial usage sometimes being ambiguous as to whether OVOCs are a subset of VOCs or whether VOCs represent the un-oxygenated (i.e., non-methane hydrocarbon, NMHC) suite of compounds. Volatility-based nomenclature separates VOCs from semi-volatile OC (SVOC) and intermediate-volatility OC (IVOC) species (Robinson et al., 2007). For this study, we use NMOGs, which encompasses all gas-phase organic compounds (excluding methane), regardless of volatility, degree of oxygenation, or other chemical properties.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003782, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2005年中国污染物排放不确定性量化显示：燃煤电力行业SO2仅有±13%误差最小，而生物质燃烧的BC/OC高达-25~136%/-40~121%，分行业误差源清晰,理由是提供关键历史基准年数据与分行业核心发现，特定源类别的差异极具研究价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['sector-specific uncertainty', 'black carbon error range']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003884, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为蒙特卡洛模拟中假设同类别排放源排放因子相同会高估不确定性，忽略了实际排放特征的多样性。,理由是指出排放因子假设的系统性偏差，但未提供具体改进方案或数据线索,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['emission factor heterogeneity', 'uncertainty overestimation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'As described above, the uncertainty analysis in this study are based on sector (or sub-sector) estimates, i.e., the emission factors for all plants in a given emission source category are assumed to be identical for the Monte Carlo simulations. That assumption, however, is hardly realistic, as the complexity and diversity of emission characteristics for a given source category will lead to differences in practice. This approach might therefore overestimate somewhat the uncertainties of emissions.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002997, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 2, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX清单整合各国排放数据，优先本地化清单（中国MEIC/印度ANL-India/韩国CAPSS），中国NH3采用PKU-NH3替代。,理由是聚焦排放清单构建方法学，未涉及PM2.5污染效应或控制政策。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission mosaic', 'PKU-NH3 substitution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'We then selected different emission datasets for various species for each country by the following hierarchy. REAS2 was used as the default where local emission data are absent. Emission inventories compiled by the official agencies or developed with more local information are selected to override REAS2, which include MEIC for mainland China, ANL-India for India, and CAPSS for the Republic of Korea. Detailed information and advantages of these inventories are presented in Sect. 2.2. As only a few species  $(\\mathrm{SO}_2,$  BC, OC, and power plant  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  were available from ANL-India, REAS2 was used to supplement the missing species. A mosaic process was then used to combine ANL-India and REAS2 into a single dataset for Indian emissions. It is worth noting that the REAS2 has incorporated local inventories for Japan and Taiwan, which are subsequently adopted in MIX for these two regions. PKU-NH<sub>3</sub> was further used to replace MEIC emissions for NH<sub>3</sub> over China, given that PKU-NH<sub>3</sub> was developed with a process-based model that represented the spatiotemporal variations in NH<sub>3</sub> emissions. Table 2 lists the information of each inventory used in MIX.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003017, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC模型提供月尺度排放数据（0.25°网格），经网站自定义元数据生成，MIX中按四大部门聚合（电力/工业/居民/交通）。,理由是描述排放模型技术细节，与PM2.5污染控制关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC model', 'Sectoral aggregation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC delivers monthly emissions at various spatial resolutions through an open-access, online framework (http://www.meicmodel.org). Monthly variations and gridded emissions were generated by sector using different temporal profiles and spatial proxies. Users can define the metadata (species, domain range, time period, sectors, spatial resolution, and chemical mechanisms), calculate gridded emissions, and download data from the website. Monthly emissions at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  generated from MEIC v1.0 (referred to as MEIC hereafter) were used in MIX. Emissions were aggregated to four MIX sectors: power, industry, residential, and transportation.  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$  emissions in MEIC were replaced by PKU-  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ , which will be discussed in the next section.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        本次是第6次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出PM2.5污染治理的主要难点在于其形成机制的复杂性，涉及多种前体物和污染来源的协同作用。,理由是提供治理PM2.5污染的背景挑战说明，但缺乏具体数据或可深挖的技术线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'At present, tackling the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  issue is the most challenging due to its complex formation, with contributions from multiple precursors and sources. Air quality management in China has thus'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003855, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为燃煤电厂PM粒径分布基于实测数据，而工业锅炉因缺乏粗颗粒数据采用国外研究，交通部门PM全部视为PM2.5（详见Table S6）。,理由是明确不同源类PM处理方法的差异并关联补充材料Table S6，建议追踪Zhao2010的实测数据,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM size-fractionated', 'coal-fired power plants', 'USEPA AP-42']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The uncertainties of PM of different size categories (i.e.,  $f$  in Eq. (3)) from coal-fired power plants were analyzed by the authors using field measurements (Zhao et al., 2010) and are directly incorporated into this study. Although a few similar tests have been conducted of industrial boilers, most of the results cannot be directly applied due to lack of data on coarse fractions. Therefore, results of foreign studies are used for sectors other than power generation (USEPA, 2002; Klimont et al., 2002), and uniform distributions are assumed given the potentially large uncertainties. Additionally, PM emitted from gasoline or diesel combustion in the transportation sector is assumed to be entirely  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  (see details in Table S6 in Supplement).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002930, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为六种OVOCs日间显著上升表明光化学生产占主导；乙醛浓度日变化特性与臭氧相似（湿季尤甚），暗示其二次生成来源（Chang2019）；甲醇/MEK/乙酸则具机动车一次排放特征（Guo2011, Zheng2013）。,理由是解析OVOCs来源机制的重要证据，需结合图4使用但未提供新深挖入口。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Photochemical OVOC production', 'Acetaldehyde secondary formation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'be due to the dilution caused by the uplift of the planetary boundary layer (PBL). However, the six OVOCs exhibited a significant upward trend during the daytime. These results suggested that photochemical production and/or daytime anthropogenic activities related to OVC emissions were notable and could overwhelm photochemical loss. The diurnal variation trend of acetaldehyde was most similar to that of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$ , exhibiting a greater difference in concentration between day and night during the wet season, indicating that the majority of acetaldehyde originated from daytime secondary generation (Chang et al., 2019). The daytime splits of the diurnal curves of methanol, MEK, and acetic acid, similar to benzene, implied that they could have relatively larger contributions from primary emissions sources, such as motor vehicle emissions. (Guo et al., 2011, Zheng et al., 2013). The diurnal variations in VOCs in our previous two individual campaigns, which were carried out during the dry season (Huang et al., 2019, 2020), were almost the same as those in the dry season in this study.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图5显示2013-2018年中国人口TOP20城市PM2.5年均浓度趋势，基于国家监测中心数据，可分析重点城市污染控制成效。,理由是关键趋势图涵盖核心城市群6年官方数据，具高挖掘价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Top populated cities', 'CNEMC monitoring']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/0f279d0e-f433-4ff5-a174-a87e93fa4067/982f0b6060034b8a5fb202d478a9815a0826f0c19f8087b72239a8e59ae3a058.jpg)  \nFig. 5. Trend of annual average  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations for the top 20 most populated cities in China from 2013 to 2018. Observed  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations were obtained from the China National Environmental Monitoring Center.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003571, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'ICP-MS fingerprint validation across vehicle emission standards'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为中国车辆排放存在三代标准混行现象，采用30-35km/h速度匹配法消除工况偏差。,理由是揭示排放因子数据集（MEEPRC-2014）关键限制条件及解决方案。多文献引用增强可信度。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Multi-standard vehicle fleets', 'MEEPRC GEI', 'Speed-matched emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "China's vehicle emissions are highly heterogeneous (Deng et al., 2020). Continuous upgrading of vehicle emission standards has resulted in on-road vehicle fleets consisting of at least three emission levels (Deng et al., 2020), thus challenging the accurate estimation of emission characteristics of vehicles. Currently, the most widely used vehicle emission factor dataset is based on the technical guidelines on emission inventory (GEI) released by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment of the People's Republic of China (MEEPRC) in 2014 (MEEPRC, 2014), with testing speeds of  $30 - 35\\mathrm{km / h}$ . In order to eliminate the influences of working conditions on emission factors, we selected vehicle data with the same driving speeds from the annual inspection dataset to derive corresponding vehicle"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003783, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为蒙特卡洛法缩小了自下而上排放研究的误差范围，但与卫星观测存差异，突显改进CO2等关联污染物量化对政策制定的必要性,理由是提出方法论局限性与政策关联，但缺乏具体对比数据，适合作上下文,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['top-down verification', 'CO2 co-estimation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'these emission uncertainties. Although Monte Carlo simulation yields narrowed estimates of uncertainties compared to previous bottom-up emission studies, the results are not always consistent with those derived from satellite observations. The results thus represent an incremental research advance; while the analysis provides current estimates of uncertainty to researchers investigating Chinese and global atmospheric transport and chemistry, it also identifies specific needs in data collection and analysis to improve on them. Strengthened quantification of emissions of the included species and other, closely associated ones – notably  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ , generated largely by the same processes and thus subject to many of the same parameter uncertainties – is essential not only for science but for the design of policies to redress critical atmospheric environmental hazards at local, regional, and global scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Monte Carlo simulation is used to analyze the uncertainties of the emission inventory in this study. For parameters with adequate domestic measurement data, a probability distribution is fitted using Crystal Ball, a statistical software package, and the Kolmogorov-Smirnov test for the'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

Normalized average diurnal variations in  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and typical VOCs during the dry and wet seasons from 2014 to 2019 (shaded part:  $\\pm \\mathrm{SD}$ ).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003662, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'ICP-MS fingerprint validation across vehicle emission standards'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 1, 'credibility': 5},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是与chunk_003539内容100%重复，属冗余信息,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The main cause of the huge differences in the results of previous studies has been associated with the large uncertainties in the test results and poor representativeness of test samples. Test samples were usually so limited (<200) that the test results obtained in previous studies could not statistically represent the emission levels of the whole fleet (Cao et al., 2016; He et al., 2019; Mera et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2020a; Yu et al., 2016). Covering samples of all emission standards and vehicle manufacturers is the key to improving the accuracy of vehicle emission factors. Due to limited budgets or efforts, the design of sample sizes is usually determined on the basis of researchers' experience and has not yet been derived systematically (Chen et al., 2019). Therefore, establishing the high precision vehicle emission inventory from a big data perspective is of vital importance."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002929, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图4显示干湿两季臭氧和VOCs归一化浓度日变化相似，湿季白天臭氧和OVOCs上升幅度更大；苯呈现早晚双峰（交通排放相关），下午浓度降低可能与边界层抬升有关。,理由是提供了VOCs季节变化的关键观测数据，虽无具体深挖线索但具重要背景价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Diurnal variation of VOCs', 'PBL dilution effect']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The average diurnal variations in mixing ratios of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and selected VOCs during the dry and wet seasons are shown in Fig. 4. To more clearly compare the diurnal variation trends of the pollutants, all concentrations were normalized (divided by their respective average concentrations). The diurnal variations of the same species during the dry and wet seasons were similar, but  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and OVOCs rose relatively more during the daytime during the warmer wet season. The diurnal variation of benzene showed two peaks corresponding to the morning and afternoon traffic emissions, but the concentration decreased in the afternoon, which may'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003896, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为首次应用蒙特卡洛模拟量化中国大气污染物自下而上排放清单的全盘不确定性，指出需跨领域研究缩小误差,理由是核心方法论描述清晰但未提供具体数据，适合作为背景研究保留,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo simulation', 'bottom-up emission inventory']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'This study applies Monte Carlo simulation to quantify, for the first time, the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of China that is comprehensive in terms of key air pollutants, emitting sectors of the economy, and national scope. While providing current estimates of uncertainty to researchers investigating Chinese and global atmospheric transport and chemistry, this advance is nevertheless an incremental step, as it also illustrates the need for new investigations in diverse fields to narrow these uncertainties. In particular, the many parameter assumptions described in'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In order to alleviate the impact of older vehicles on air quality, some cities in China, like Shanghai and Beijing, have adopted the policies to restrict the driving area of Euro 2 LDGVs and encourage the elimination of Euro 2 LDGVs through fiscal incentives. There measures will be definitely helpful to reduce the high-emitting vehicles. However, some normal-emitting vehicles will be unfairly treated at the same time. Inspection and maintenance (I/M) program for in-use vehicles is another important measure to supervise high-emitting vehicles. In recent years, most of the cities in China have established the ability on emission inspection by simple loaded mode methods for LDGVs. However, the results of this study implies that the existing I/M program has failed to effectively supervise the high emissions from old vehicles. LDGV is the most popular and rapid growing vehicle type in China. Enhancing the supervision of high pollution vehicles and strengthening the compliance tests of in-use vehicles should be the focus of vehicle'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "High  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, which are known as haze episodes, frequently hit many Chinese cities in winter, significantly deteriorating visibility and harming people's health. However,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  was not officially listed in China's NAAQS until the amendment in 2012, when China adopted the WHO Interim Target-1 level  $(35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3})$  as the annual mean limit for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. Since then, an official  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  monitoring network has been gradually established to diagnose more ground-level  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, with hourly results available to the public. In 2013,  $96\\%$  of the 74 key cities in China did not meet the NAAQS annual  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. The most polluted cities were located in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei (BTH) region, where the annual averages were 2-3 times the limit. During a serious haze pollution episode in January 2013, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations were recorded as high as  $800\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [14]. Image spectroradiometers onboard satellites provided the measurement of aerosol optical depth (AOD), which is used to characterize continuous trends in ground-level"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究表明传统车辆排放测试样本量不足(<200辆)导致结果缺乏统计代表性，需通过大数据方法建立高精度排放清单,理由是指出当前排放研究的核心局限(小样本偏差)并提出解决方案方向,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['emission factors uncertainty', 'fleet representativeness', 'emission inventory big data']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "The main cause of the huge differences in the results of previous studies has been associated with the large uncertainties in the test results and poor representativeness of test samples. Test samples were usually so limited (<200) that the test results obtained in previous studies could not statistically represent the emission levels of the whole fleet (Cao et al., 2016; He et al., 2019; Mera et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2020a; Yu et al., 2016). Covering samples of all emission standards and vehicle manufacturers is the key to improving the accuracy of vehicle emission factors. Due to limited budgets or efforts, the design of sample sizes is usually determined on the basis of researchers' experience and has not yet been derived systematically (Chen et al., 2019). Therefore, establishing the high precision vehicle emission inventory from a big data perspective is of vital importance."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003164, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX排放清单中，SO₂、NOₓ和CO₂等大规模燃烧源物种不确定性较小（~30%），而CO、NMVOC和碳质气溶胶等分散源物种不确定性较大（~100%），不同方法估算结果不可直接比较。,理由是提供了关键污染物不确定性的定量分类对比并引用多篇核心文献（Lu2011, Zhao2011等），建议深挖Table 9数据,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['mosaic emission inventory', 'uncertainty propagation', 'carbonaceous aerosols']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The MIX emission inventory subjects to uncertainties and several limitations. Emission estimates from bottom-up inventories are uncertain due to lack of complete knowledge of human activities and emission from different sources. Uncertainty ranges of an emission inventory could be estimated using propagation of error or Monte Carlo approaches (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhao et al., 2011). However, in a mosaic emission inventory like MIX, a normalized quantitative assessment of uncertainty ranges is difficult because detailed information for emission inventory development is not collected. Table 9 summarized the uncertainty range estimates for China, India, and other Asian regions in different regional emission inventories. It should be noted that those ranges are not directly comparable due to differences in methods (propagation of error or Monte Carlo simulation). However, those numbers might roughly represent the uncertainty ranges in the MIX inventory as it was compiled from several inventories listed in Table 9. In general, uncertainty ranges are relatively small for species which emissions are dominated my large-scale combustion sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , and  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ) but larger for species whose emissions are mainly from small-scale and scattered sources (e.g., CO, NMVOC, and carbonaceous aerosols). More detailed discussions on the uncertainty sources of Asian emission inventories can be found in previous literatures (e.g., Lu et al., 2011; Zhao et al., 2011; Kurokawa et al., 2013).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001300, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为卫星观测HCHO/CHOCHO用于约束NMVOC排放的模型存在显著偏差：MEGANv2.1高估生物源排放30-60%，RETRO清单低估人为源排放13-16%，需考虑非线性化学反应和传输过程的空间偏差。,理由是揭示了关键模型偏差及优化方法（贝叶斯分析/GEOS-Chem），提供源paper_003中可深挖的定量化修正方案。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HCHO column constraint', 'MEGANv2.1 bias', 'Bayesian emission inversion']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A top-down approach, utilizing observed data, has been developed for estimating VOCs emissions. For instance, based on aircraft and ground-based field measurements, the source-receptor relationships algorithm with Lagrangian particle dispersion model (Fang et al., 2016), mixed layer gradient techniques (Mo et al., 2020), eddy covariance flux measurements (Yuan et al., 2015), and box model (Wang et al., 2020) have been employed to complement or verify bottom-up results. However, these approaches do not comprehensively consider the complex nonlinear chemical reactions and transport processes that VOCs undergo in the atmosphere. Formaldehyde (HCHO) and glyoxal (CHOCHO) in the atmosphere serve as crucial oxidization intermediates for various VOCs (Hong et al., 2021; Liu et al., 2012). Satellite-based observations can readily detect their presence in the form of vertical column density (VCD) from space, making them widely utilized for estimating NMVOC emissions. A commonly used approach assumes that the observed HCHO/CHOCHO columns are locally linearly correlated with VOC emission rates (Palmer et al., 2006; Liu et al., 2012). However, this approach does not consider the spatial offset resulting from chemistry reactions and transport processes. Chaliyakunnel et al. (2019) conducted a Bayesian analysis to derive an optimal estimate of VOC emissions using HCHO measurements over the Indian subcontinent. Their results indicated that biogenic VOC emissions modeled by MEGANv2.1 were overestimated by approximately  $30 - 60\\%$ , whereas anthropogenic VOC emissions derived from the RETRO inventory were underestimated by  $13 - 16\\%$ . Cao et al. (2018) employed the GEOS-Chem model and its adjoint, incorporating tropospheric HCHO and CHOCHO column data from the GOME-2A and OMI satellites as constraints, to quantify Chinese NMVOC emissions. They demonstrated a low bias in the MEGAN model, in contrast to the significant overestimation shown in Bauwens et al. (2016), especially in southern China.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002683, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC v1.0提供2008/2010年中国0.25°网格化人为排放数据（含SO2、NOx、VOCs等），与MIX清单和EDGARv4.3互补构建HTAP全球排放,理由是说明排放清单数据源及融合方法，对模型研究有参考价值但无直接观测结果或趋势分析,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC inventory', 'HTAP mosaic', 'MIX harmonization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC is developed by Tsinghua University under an open-access model framework that provides model-ready emission data over China to support chemical transport models and climate models at different spatial resolution and time scale. In the MIX inventory, the MEIC v.1.0 data were used, which contain the anthropogenic emissions of China for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , PMcoarse, BC, and OC for the years 2008 and 2010 with monthly temporal variation at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$ . For India, MIX used the Indian emission inventory provided by ANL (Argonne National Laboratory) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC and REAS2.1 for other species. With the input from different regions, the MIX inventory provided harmonized emission data at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  grid resolution with monthly variation for both 2008 and 2010. The detailed mosaic process of the MIX inventory is documented in Li et al. (2015). Reported emissions from countries which are only partly covered by the MIX, like Russia, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan and Kazakhstan were not taken up in the HTAP inventory and instead gap filling by EDGARv4.3 was used (see Sect. 2.2.4).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为与chunk_003571内容文字完全重复（中国排放标准异质性部分）。,理由是同一研究的重复片段（相同文本内容和文献引用），保留前一证据即可。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "China's vehicle emissions are highly heterogeneous (Deng et al., 2020). Continuous upgrading of vehicle emission standards has resulted in on-road vehicle fleets consisting of at least three emission levels (Deng et al., 2020), thus challenging the accurate estimation of emission characteristics of vehicles. Currently, the most widely used vehicle emission factor dataset is based on the technical guidelines on emission inventory (GEI) released by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment of the People's Republic of China (MEEPRC) in 2014 (MEEPRC, 2014), with testing speeds of  $30 - 35\\mathrm{km / h}$ . In order to eliminate the influences of working conditions on emission factors, we selected vehicle data with the same driving speeds from the annual inspection dataset to derive corresponding vehicle"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003905, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为中国工业源排放清单在国家级(-17~37% SO2不确定区间)、省级(-15~18%)和市级(-17~22%)尺度量化中，发现排放因子是主要误差源，且省级清单PM值远高于其他研究,理由是多尺度定量对比揭示了具体污染物的不确定性范围与地域差异，包含关键数据表格,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['plant-level uncertainty', '95% confidence intervals', 'PM discrepancy']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'A comprehensive uncertainty analysis was conducted on emission inventories for industrial sources at national (China), provincial (Jiangsu), and city (Nanjing) scales for 2012. Based on various methods and data sources, Monte-Carlo simulation was applied at sector level for national inventory, and at plant level (whenever possible) for provincial and city inventories. The uncertainties of national inventory were estimated at  $-17 - 37\\%$  (expressed as  $95\\%$  confidence intervals, CIs),  $-21 - 35\\%$ $-19 - 34\\%$ $-29 - 40\\%$ $-22$ $-47\\%$ $-21 - 54\\%$ $-33 - 84\\%$  , and  $-32 - 92\\%$  for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  CO, TSP (total suspended particles),  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) emissions respectively for the whole country. At provincial and city levels, the uncertainties of corresponding pollutant emissions were estimated at  $-15 - 18\\%$ $-18$ $-33\\%$ $-16 - 37\\%$ $-20 - 30\\%$ $-23 - 45\\%$ $-26 - 50\\%$ $-33 - 79\\%$  , and  $-33 - 71\\%$  for Jiangsu, and  $-17$ $-22\\%$ $-10 - 33\\%$ $-23 - 75\\%$ $-19 - 36\\%$ $-23 - 41\\%$ $-28 - 48\\%$ $-45 - 82\\%$  , and  $-34 - 96\\%$  for Nanjing, respectively. Emission factors (or associated parameters) were identified as the biggest contributors to the uncertainties of emissions for most source categories except iron & steel production in the national inventory. Compared to national one, uncertainties of total emissions in the provincial and city-scale inventories were not significantly reduced for most species with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  . For power and other industrial boilers, the uncertainties were reduced, and the plant-specific parameters played more important roles to the uncertainties. Much larger  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  emissions for Jiangsu were estimated in this provincial inventory than other studies, implying the big discrepancies on data sources of emission factors and activity data between local and national inventories. Although the uncertainty analysis of bottom-up emission inventories at national and local scales partly supported the "top-down" estimates using observation and/or chemistry transport models, detailed investigations and field measurements were recommended for further improving the emission estimates and reducing the uncertainty of inventories at local and regional scales, for both industrial and other sectors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

To better depict the contribution trends of different OVOC sources, the parameters were normalized (based on'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002899, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2019年深圳OVOCs浓度干季增13%，2015-2019年从30.3ppb降至18.7ppb；人为源贡献占32-51%，污染控制使一次人为源降50-60%但未改善二次生成OVOCs,理由是包含关键数据：长期浓度趋势、季节特征、具体源贡献率及污染控制措施效果，且指出二次污染未受控的核心问题,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['secondary OVOCs formation', 'anthropogenic reduction efficacy', 'photochemical age parameterization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are important precursors and intermediate products of atmospheric photochemical reactions, which can promote the formation of secondary pollutants such as ozone  $(\\mathrm{O}_3)$  and secondary organic aerosol (SOA). However, there have been few studies on the sources of and long-term variation in ambient OVOCs. This study combined sensitive, near real-time measurements of VOCs by proton transfer reaction-mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) with an improved photochemical age parameterization method to quantify daytime sources of OVOCs in an urban atmosphere in China from 2014 to 2019, permitting the observation of the impacts of emission control strategies that were implemented during this period. Temporal variation in six key OVOCs (methanol, acetaldehyde, acetone, methyl ethyl ketone (MEK), formic acid, and acetic acid) were observed. The sum of concentrations of OVOCs was averagely  $13\\%$  higher during the dry season (November to April), when winds transported polluted air masses to Shenzhen from the continent, than during the wet season, and peak diurnal levels occurred during the daytime year-round due to photochemical production and higher daytime anthropogenic emissions. The average dry season concentration of OVOCs declined from a peak of 30.3 ppb in 2015 to 18.7 ppb in 2019. The results of source apportionment showed that primary anthropogenic sources contributed the most to methanol, MEK, and acetic acid  $(32 - 51\\%)$ ; the dominant sources of acetaldehyde and formic acid were both primary and secondary anthropogenic sources; and biomass burning contributed a small fraction  $(5 - 11\\%)$  to the six OVOCs. From 2014 to 2019, contributions from primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased significantly by  $50 - 60\\%$  due to intensive pollution control measures in Shenzhen, whereas pollution control measures had no observable impact on secondary OVOCs, indicating their formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002603, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为图2通过频率直方图可视化2014-2020年中国368个城市PM2.5分布，叠加WHO五级空气质量目标线（AQG:5μg/m³至IT-1:35μg/m³），揭示城市达标进展。,理由是核心图表展示全国城市级PM2.5时空演变与WHO标准对比，含定量分层数据。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 frequency histogram', 'WHO Interim Targets']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/be8162a1-b632-4506-baf9-c0e07d4e90b7/6ddf1e35b2d69f9794bc7a9cd7d5117661b5741e034a018b0fff324f415c2bae.jpg)  \nFig. 2.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  distribution at city-level in 2014 to 2020. The frequency histograms in (a)-(g) denote the frequency distribution of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in 368 cities across mainland China. The dot lines denote the air quality targets of WHO (i.e., IT-1, IT-2, IT-3, IT-4 and AQG of annual mean concentrations of 35, 25, 15, 10, and  $5\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为该文本详细描述PTR-MS仪器监测VOCs时的背景信号扣除方法和参数设置,理由是属于实验方法细节，未提供核心污染变化趋势或来源解析结果，与研究主题关联度低,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PTR-MS background subtraction', 'multiple ion detection']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '$(\\sim 10\\%)$  (Zhu et al., 2018). Considering that the inlet loss of each VOC species was not large enough, the data of VOCs have not been corrected in this study. During online monitoring, background signals were detected for 30 out of every 300 scan cycles. The background values were measured by passing ambient air through a platinum-coated wool trap at  $360^{\\circ}\\mathrm{C}$  to remove VOCs from the ambient air without changing the water content before entering the PTR-MS measurement system. The real VOC response signals were obtained by subtracting the background signals from the atmospheric signals of the samples. PTR-MS was performed in multiple ion detection (MID) mode during the observation period, and each cycle scanned multiple selected ions, taking approximately 30 s (Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019), and 1-h averaged data were used for data analysis. The set values for the main instrument parameters during the observation period are shown in Table S2. In addition, the concentration of ambient  $\\mathrm{O}_3$  was measured by a  $49\\mathrm{iO}_3$  analyzer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, USA).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002970, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为二次人为源对OVOCs贡献稳定主因大气氧化能力增强（珠三角O₃浓度上升）抵消了前体物减排效果，形成动态平衡。,理由是阐明二次生成机制的重要见解，但缺乏具体数值支撑，需结合其他证据构成完整图景。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary anthropogenic sources', 'Atmospheric oxidizing capacity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'sources to OVOCs did not decrease significantly over the six-year study period, which indicated the OVOC formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors. Previous studies have shown that atmospheric oxidizing capacity was strong in the PRD region, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ , one of important atmospheric oxidizing substances, was on the rise in this region in recent years, which may strongly transform VOC to OVOCs and SOA (Wang et al., 2020; Gong et al., 2018; Xue et al., 2014). Therefore, the relatively stable contribution of secondary anthropogenic sources over the six years could be explained by a net effect of the increased atmospheric oxidizing capacity and decreased primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003480, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为1999年清华大学首次在北京监测PM2.5，年均浓度115-127μg/m³，证实PM2.5主要来源于二次气溶胶（铵硝酸盐/硫酸盐、有机气溶胶），单一粉尘控制不足以改善污染。,理由是提供中国PM2.5研究早期关键数据，但未包含新深挖线索或可视化元素。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary aerosols', 'Ammonium nitrate sulfate']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Chinese policymakers took a longer path to recognize issues with  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in comparison with their response to the acid rain issue. The landmark Harvard Six Cities Study for the eastern United States suggested that ambient fine particle exposures—and not exposures of coarse particle fractions—were specifically associated with daily mortality [11], leading to the first  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  NAAQS being established by the US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) in 1997 [12]. Shortly after, researchers in China began to measure ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and analyze their chemical composition. A research group at Tsinghua University pioneered the continuous measurement of ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations in Beijing in 1999, and reported annual average values of between 115 and  $127\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [13]. As opposed to coarser particles, secondary aerosols (e.g., ammonium nitrate and sulfate, and organic aerosols) rather than primary ones were found to be responsible for the majority of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , suggesting that controlling dust emissions alone (which had been ongoing since 1970s) could not sufficiently reduce overall  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是重复paper_012的方法描述且未补充新数据或结论，信息冗余,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'tracked and a detailed Monte-Carlo simulation framework was established, evaluating the uncertainties of emissions from individual plants. At national scale, the uncertainties of emissions of China and Jiangsu were also quantified following the method of our previous work (Zhao et al., 2011). The impacts of various data and methods between multi-scale inventories on the uncertainties of emission estimation are further analyzed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_000596, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为讨论NMOGs（涵盖VOCs/OVOCs/IVOCs）的术语定义演变，侧重概念范围而非实证研究。,理由是术语解释性内容无实测数据或模型，与研究主题关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['NMOG definition', 'Volatility-based speciation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'defines VOCs as any compound that participates in atmospheric photochemical reactions except for those that they designate as having minimal reactivity. The term oxygenated VOC (OVOC) (Goldstein and Galbally, 2007; Kwan et al., 2006) has further blurred these definitions, with colloquial usage sometimes being ambiguous as to whether OVOCs are a subset of VOCs or whether VOCs represent the un-oxygenated (i.e., non-methane hydrocarbon, NMHC) suite of compounds. Volatility-based nomenclature separates VOCs from semi-volatile OC (SVOC) and intermediate-volatility OC (IVOC) species (Robinson et al., 2007). For this study, we use NMOGs, which encompasses all gas-phase organic compounds (excluding methane), regardless of volatility, degree of oxygenation, or other chemical properties.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003782, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2005年中国污染物排放不确定性量化显示：燃煤电力行业SO2仅有±13%误差最小，而生物质燃烧的BC/OC高达-25~136%/-40~121%，分行业误差源清晰,理由是提供关键历史基准年数据与分行业核心发现，特定源类别的差异极具研究价值,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['sector-specific uncertainty', 'black carbon error range']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The uncertainties of a national, bottom-up inventory of Chinese emissions of anthropogenic  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , and particulate matter (PM) of different size classes and carbonaceous species are comprehensively quantified, for the first time, using Monte Carlo simulation. The inventory is structured by seven dominant sectors: coal-fired electric power, cement, iron and steel, other industry (boiler combustion), other industry (non-combustion processes), transportation, and residential. For each parameter related to emission factors or activity-level calculations, the uncertainties, represented as probability distributions, are either statistically fitted using results of domestic field tests or, when these are lacking, estimated based on foreign or other domestic data. The uncertainties (i.e.,  $95\\%$  confidence intervals around the central estimates) of Chinese emissions of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$ , total PM,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{10}$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , black carbon (BC), and organic carbon (OC) in 2005 are estimated to be  $-14\\% \\sim 13\\%$ ,  $-13\\% \\sim 37\\%$ ,  $-11\\% \\sim 38\\%$ ,  $-14\\% \\sim 45\\%$ ,  $-17\\% \\sim 54\\%$ ,  $-25\\% \\sim 136\\%$ , and  $-40\\% \\sim 121\\%$ , respectively. Variations at activity levels (e.g., energy consumption or industrial production) are not the main source of emission uncertainties. Due to narrow classification of source types, large sample sizes, and relatively high data quality, the coal-fired power sector is estimated to have the smallest emission uncertainties for all species except BC and OC. Due to poorer source classifications and a wider range of estimated emission factors, considerable uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  and PM emissions from cement production and boiler combustion in other industries are found. The probability distributions of emission factors for biomass burning, the largest source of BC and OC, are fitted based on very limited domestic field measurements, and special caution should thus be taken interpreting'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003884, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为蒙特卡洛模拟中假设同类别排放源排放因子相同会高估不确定性，忽略了实际排放特征的多样性。,理由是指出排放因子假设的系统性偏差，但未提供具体改进方案或数据线索,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['emission factor heterogeneity', 'uncertainty overestimation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'As described above, the uncertainty analysis in this study are based on sector (or sub-sector) estimates, i.e., the emission factors for all plants in a given emission source category are assumed to be identical for the Monte Carlo simulations. That assumption, however, is hardly realistic, as the complexity and diversity of emission characteristics for a given source category will lead to differences in practice. This approach might therefore overestimate somewhat the uncertainties of emissions.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为卫星数据证实2004-2007年京津冀地区是中国PM2.5污染最严重区域,理由是提供关键区域历史污染基准但未涉及减排政策作用,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['BTH region PM2.5', 'satellite-based aerosol measurement']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '$\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ . These satellite-based measurements confirmed that the BTH region faced the most serious  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution within China, with significant deterioration during 2004-2007 [15].'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002997, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 2, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MIX清单整合各国排放数据，优先本地化清单（中国MEIC/印度ANL-India/韩国CAPSS），中国NH3采用PKU-NH3替代。,理由是聚焦排放清单构建方法学，未涉及PM2.5污染效应或控制政策。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission mosaic', 'PKU-NH3 substitution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'We then selected different emission datasets for various species for each country by the following hierarchy. REAS2 was used as the default where local emission data are absent. Emission inventories compiled by the official agencies or developed with more local information are selected to override REAS2, which include MEIC for mainland China, ANL-India for India, and CAPSS for the Republic of Korea. Detailed information and advantages of these inventories are presented in Sect. 2.2. As only a few species  $(\\mathrm{SO}_2,$  BC, OC, and power plant  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$  were available from ANL-India, REAS2 was used to supplement the missing species. A mosaic process was then used to combine ANL-India and REAS2 into a single dataset for Indian emissions. It is worth noting that the REAS2 has incorporated local inventories for Japan and Taiwan, which are subsequently adopted in MIX for these two regions. PKU-NH<sub>3</sub> was further used to replace MEIC emissions for NH<sub>3</sub> over China, given that PKU-NH<sub>3</sub> was developed with a process-based model that represented the spatiotemporal variations in NH<sub>3</sub> emissions. Table 2 lists the information of each inventory used in MIX.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003017, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC模型提供月尺度排放数据（0.25°网格），经网站自定义元数据生成，MIX中按四大部门聚合（电力/工业/居民/交通）。,理由是描述排放模型技术细节，与PM2.5污染控制关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC model', 'Sectoral aggregation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC delivers monthly emissions at various spatial resolutions through an open-access, online framework (http://www.meicmodel.org). Monthly variations and gridded emissions were generated by sector using different temporal profiles and spatial proxies. Users can define the metadata (species, domain range, time period, sectors, spatial resolution, and chemical mechanisms), calculate gridded emissions, and download data from the website. Monthly emissions at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  generated from MEIC v1.0 (referred to as MEIC hereafter) were used in MIX. Emissions were aggregated to four MIX sectors: power, industry, residential, and transportation.  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$  emissions in MEIC were replaced by PKU-  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ , which will be discussed in the next section.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        本次是第6次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为指出PM2.5污染治理的主要难点在于其形成机制的复杂性，涉及多种前体物和污染来源的协同作用。,理由是提供治理PM2.5污染的背景挑战说明，但缺乏具体数据或可深挖的技术线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'At present, tackling the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  issue is the most challenging due to its complex formation, with contributions from multiple precursors and sources. Air quality management in China has thus'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003855, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为燃煤电厂PM粒径分布基于实测数据，而工业锅炉因缺乏粗颗粒数据采用国外研究，交通部门PM全部视为PM2.5（详见Table S6）。,理由是明确不同源类PM处理方法的差异并关联补充材料Table S6，建议追踪Zhao2010的实测数据,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM size-fractionated', 'coal-fired power plants', 'USEPA AP-42']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The uncertainties of PM of different size categories (i.e.,  $f$  in Eq. (3)) from coal-fired power plants were analyzed by the authors using field measurements (Zhao et al., 2010) and are directly incorporated into this study. Although a few similar tests have been conducted of industrial boilers, most of the results cannot be directly applied due to lack of data on coarse fractions. Therefore, results of foreign studies are used for sectors other than power generation (USEPA, 2002; Klimont et al., 2002), and uniform distributions are assumed given the potentially large uncertainties. Additionally, PM emitted from gasoline or diesel combustion in the transportation sector is assumed to be entirely  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  (see details in Table S6 in Supplement).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002930, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为六种OVOCs日间显著上升表明光化学生产占主导；乙醛浓度日变化特性与臭氧相似（湿季尤甚），暗示其二次生成来源（Chang2019）；甲醇/MEK/乙酸则具机动车一次排放特征（Guo2011, Zheng2013）。,理由是解析OVOCs来源机制的重要证据，需结合图4使用但未提供新深挖入口。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Photochemical OVOC production', 'Acetaldehyde secondary formation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'be due to the dilution caused by the uplift of the planetary boundary layer (PBL). However, the six OVOCs exhibited a significant upward trend during the daytime. These results suggested that photochemical production and/or daytime anthropogenic activities related to OVC emissions were notable and could overwhelm photochemical loss. The diurnal variation trend of acetaldehyde was most similar to that of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$ , exhibiting a greater difference in concentration between day and night during the wet season, indicating that the majority of acetaldehyde originated from daytime secondary generation (Chang et al., 2019). The daytime splits of the diurnal curves of methanol, MEK, and acetic acid, similar to benzene, implied that they could have relatively larger contributions from primary emissions sources, such as motor vehicle emissions. (Guo et al., 2011, Zheng et al., 2013). The diurnal variations in VOCs in our previous two individual campaigns, which were carried out during the dry season (Huang et al., 2019, 2020), were almost the same as those in the dry season in this study.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': '![](https://cdn-mineru.openxlab.org.cn/result/2025-12-03/0f279d0e-f433-4ff5-a174-a87e93fa4067/982f0b6060034b8a5fb202d478a9815a0826f0c19f8087b72239a8e59ae3a058.jpg)  \nFig. 5. Trend of annual average  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations for the top 20 most populated cities in China from 2013 to 2018. 证据节点ID: chunk_003571, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'ICP-MS fingerprint validation across vehicle emission standards'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为中国车辆排放存在三代标准混行现象，采用30-35km/h速度匹配法消除工况偏差。,理由是揭示排放因子数据集（MEEPRC-2014）关键限制条件及解决方案。多文献引用增强可信度。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Multi-standard vehicle fleets', 'MEEPRC GEI', 'Speed-matched emission factors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "China's vehicle emissions are highly heterogeneous (Deng et al., 2020). Continuous upgrading of vehicle emission standards has resulted in on-road vehicle fleets consisting of at least three emission levels (Deng et al., 2020), thus challenging the accurate estimation of emission characteristics of vehicles. Currently, the most widely used vehicle emission factor dataset is based on the technical guidelines on emission inventory (GEI) released by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment of the People's Republic of China (MEEPRC) in 2014 (MEEPRC, 2014), with testing speeds of  $30 - 35\\mathrm{km / h}$ . In order to eliminate the influences of working conditions on emission factors, we selected vehicle data with the same driving speeds from the annual inspection dataset to derive corresponding vehicle"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None
