```
证据节点ID: chunk_002903, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据揭示甲醛等低碳OVOCs通过光解产生OH自由基影响大气氧化性，并参与产生臭氧(如北京研究中羰基化合物O₃生成潜势达166.1μg/m³，是BTEX的2.5倍)。同时证明OVOCs与呼吸系统健康风险关联。,理由是核心论述OVOCs的环境与健康双重作用，提供定量数据及多篇关键文献引用（Zhang/Shou/Zhu等），具明确深挖价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Formaldehyde photolysis', 'O3 formation potential', 'Carbonyl compounds toxicity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  through photolysis to affect the oxidizing capacity of the atmosphere (Volkamer et al., 2010; Shao et al., 2011; Xue et al., 2016). OVOCs can also participate in photochemical reactions and contribute to the generation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and SOA (Louie et al., 2013; Ehn et al., 2014). In addition, as most OVOCs are highly water soluble, they can be absorbed into the human body, irritating the eyes, skin and respiratory tract, thus harming human health. OVOCs such as formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, acetone and acrolein have been shown to pose serious health risks (WHO, 2000, Delfino et al., 2003; Bashkin, 2009; Du et al., 2014). Given the important role of OVOCs in photochemical reactions and the complexity of their sources, OVOCs have been the subject of extensive research recently (Sahu et al., 2017; Maji et al., 2020), especially in China, where air pollution is severe (Zhang et al., 2012, 2015; Zhou et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019). Zhang et al. (2012) studied the pollution characteristics of BTEX (benzene, toluene, ethylbenzene, m,p-xylene and o-xylene) and carbonyl compounds during summer in Beijing and found that the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation potential of carbonyl compounds  $(166.1~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$  was approximately 2.5 times that of BTEX  $(65.4~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$ . Zhou et al. (2019) used proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) to measure VOCs in Xi'an and used the positive matrix factorization (PMF) model to analyze over 30 types of VOCs and identify eight primary sources and found that local emissions, such as industrial processes, solvent usage, residential biofuel use and vehicular exhaust, contributed about  $70\\%$  of the VOCs measured. Zhu et al. (2019) used PTR-MS to monitor OVOCs during different seasons and applied photochemical age parameter analysis to evaluate the sources of OVOCs in Shenzhen. They found that primary anthropogenic sources were the most important source of OVOCs in urban areas of China."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002901, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical mechanisms of secondary OVOCs formation and validation techniques in PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为VOCs, including OVOCs such as aldehydes and ketones, act as precursors for photochemical smog and ozone formation through reactions with nitrogen oxides and ultraviolet radiation, with concentrations varying regionally.,理由是Provides general background on pollution chemistry that can support understanding of pollutant mechanisms, but it is not specific to northern China or PM2.5/PM10 focus and lacks actionable insights for the core problem.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['photochemical smog', 'nitrogen oxides', 'VOC precursors']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important precursors that can undergo atmospheric photochemical reactions with nitrogen oxides  $\\left(\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}\\right)$  under ultraviolet radiation to produce secondary products such as ozone  $\\left(\\mathrm{O}_{3}\\right)$  and peroxyacetyl nitrate (PAN) and form photochemical smog (Derwent et al., 2003; Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are a class of VOCs with oxygen-containing functional groups, mainly composed of aldehydes, ketones, and alcohols. The concentrations of atmospheric OVOCs vary greatly in different regions. Studies in clean marine areas showed that although phytoplankton in the marine may release OVOCs, such as methanol, acetaldehyde and acetone, their ambient air mixing ratios were usually only a few'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002804, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文本概括底部向上方法（bottom-up approach）是构建排放清单的传统方式，用于预测空气污染物的时空变化和支持污染控制策略。,理由是中等价值证据，提供背景知识但未引入具体深挖路径或新线索。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Bottom-up approach', 'Emission inventories']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Emission inventories are essential for predicting spatial and temporal variations in air pollutants and for helping policy makers develop pollution control strategies. The traditional way of developing an emission inventory is the bottom-up approach, whereby activity rates and emission factors are aggregated for all known sources (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhang et al., 2009). Emission inventories are most commonly estimated as emission totals of municipal districts'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_001992, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究显示MOVES、COPERT等主流车辆排放模型与中国实测排放因子存在显著差异，尤其是高排放车辆的控制装置老化问题被系统性低估。,理由是直接对比多种排放模型与实测数据，指出关键差异点，并引用多篇对比研究（Fujita2012/Liu2015），具有深度挖掘价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MOVES model', 'high emitters', 'deterioration of emission control']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "Accurate vehicle emission factors are essential to recognize their contribution to air pollution. Vehicle emission models, such as MOVES, COPERT, EMFAC, and IVE, have been widely used to develop vehicle emission inventory in previous studies (Wang et al., 2008; Wallace et al., 2012; Cai and Xie, 2013; Jing et al., 2016). In China, the MEP (Ministry of Environmental Protection of People's Republic of China) released an on-road vehicle emission inventory guidebook (shorten as EI guidebook) which recommended a series of vehicular emission factors based on the local studies (MEP, 2014). However, some measurements on LDGVs demonstrated that the modeled emission factors still have some differences with the measured ones (Fujita et al., 2012; Liu and Frey, 2015). Most of the results from real world measurements by remote sensing and chasing studies indicated that high emitters caused by deterioration of emission control devices tended to be underestimated in"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002815, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为亚洲排放清单使用人口密度和电厂经纬度作为空间代理分配排放量，CARMA数据库扩大了电厂定位覆盖范围。,理由是聚焦固定源排放空间分配方法，与车辆移动源排放因子核心议题关联弱，未提供模型验证关键信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'INTEX-B (Zhang et al., 2009), Regional Emission inventory in Asia (REAS) version 1 (Ohara et al., 2007), and REAS version 2 (Kurokawa et al., 2013), as shown in Table 1. In bottom-up inventories, spatial proxies are usually sector dependent and shared across different species. In general, all of these inventories rely on similar approaches to allocate emissions from combustion sources. Emissions from large-capacity power generation units are typically allocated according to their latitude-longitude information, which is the most accurate way to distribute emissions, whereas the population density is used to distribute emissions from small power plants whose locations are unknown (Streets et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009). Recently, power plant locations from the Carbon Monitoring for Action (CARMA) database (Wheeler and Ummel, 2008) are used to locate emissions (Kurokawa et al., 2013), providing a larger dataset of power plants than previous work. However, the ac'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5 concentrations decreased by an average of 23% across Chinese cities from 2013-2017, with Beijing reducing pollution from 89 μg/m³ to 58 μg/m³, demonstrating effective emission controls as benchmark for northern efforts.,理由是Core-related evidence showcasing quantifiable PM2.5 reduction trends in northern China, particularly Beijing, during the winter pollution period, with actionable data for further study of seasonal variations.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 reduction', 'socioeconomic decoupling', 'Beijing controls']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'the regional or national level. During the Action Plan 2013-2017, many cities effectively decoupled  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and socioeconomic development.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations deceased by an average of  $23\\%$  during this period for all municipal cities in China. Beijing has set a successful example as a pioneer in energy transition and transportation emission controls, and has achieved significant progress in mitigating  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution from  $89~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2013 to  $58~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2017.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002902, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为OVOCs浓度范围：清洁地区pptv级，污染区ppbv级；来源包括直接人为排放（溶剂/车辆）、生物源排放及NMHCs光化学氧化。,理由是基础背景知识重复叙述，无新数据或地域特徵分析，可剪除。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'to a few hundred pptv (Galbally et al., 2007; Colomb et al., 2009; Wohl et al., 2020), while the concentrations of OVOCs in polluted areas can be as high as dozens of ppbv (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016; Sheng et al., 2018; Zhou et al., 2019; Maji et al., 2020). The variation in OVOC concentrations is due to the wide variety and complexity of sources of OVOCs. OVOCs can be directly emitted by anthropogenic sources, e.g., solvent volatilization, vehicle emissions (Legreid et al., 2007; Ou et al., 2015), and biogenic sources (Jacob et al., 2002; Mellouki et al., 2015). In addition, OVOCs can also be formed as secondary products by photochemical oxidation of nonmethane hydrocarbons (NMHCs) from anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Yuan et al., 2012; Liu et al., 2015).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002899, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2019年深圳OVOCs浓度干季增13%，2015-2019年从30.3ppb降至18.7ppb；人为源贡献占32-51%，污染控制使一次人为源降50-60%但未改善二次生成OVOCs,理由是包含关键数据：长期浓度趋势、季节特征、具体源贡献率及污染控制措施效果，且指出二次污染未受控的核心问题,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['secondary OVOCs formation', 'anthropogenic reduction efficacy', 'photochemical age parameterization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are important precursors and intermediate products of atmospheric photochemical reactions, which can promote the formation of secondary pollutants such as ozone  $(\\mathrm{O}_3)$  and secondary organic aerosol (SOA). However, there have been few studies on the sources of and long-term variation in ambient OVOCs. This study combined sensitive, near real-time measurements of VOCs by proton transfer reaction-mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) with an improved photochemical age parameterization method to quantify daytime sources of OVOCs in an urban atmosphere in China from 2014 to 2019, permitting the observation of the impacts of emission control strategies that were implemented during this period. Temporal variation in six key OVOCs (methanol, acetaldehyde, acetone, methyl ethyl ketone (MEK), formic acid, and acetic acid) were observed. The sum of concentrations of OVOCs was averagely  $13\\%$  higher during the dry season (November to April), when winds transported polluted air masses to Shenzhen from the continent, than during the wet season, and peak diurnal levels occurred during the daytime year-round due to photochemical production and higher daytime anthropogenic emissions. The average dry season concentration of OVOCs declined from a peak of 30.3 ppb in 2015 to 18.7 ppb in 2019. The results of source apportionment showed that primary anthropogenic sources contributed the most to methanol, MEK, and acetic acid  $(32 - 51\\%)$ ; the dominant sources of acetaldehyde and formic acid were both primary and secondary anthropogenic sources; and biomass burning contributed a small fraction  $(5 - 11\\%)$  to the six OVOCs. From 2014 to 2019, contributions from primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased significantly by  $50 - 60\\%$  due to intensive pollution control measures in Shenzhen, whereas pollution control measures had no observable impact on secondary OVOCs, indicating their formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002296, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶尾气PM排放建模中气溶胶快速变化导致局部与区域尺度模拟需采用不同方案,理由是研究焦点为船只排放建模，与本项目中国大气污染治理主题无关,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The large variations in the experimentally determined emission factors of PM chemical components are probably caused to a large extent by the fast aerosol processes, which occur immediately, as the exhaust leaves the funnel. Significant changes in particle number concentrations, mass and composition can occur, which should be included either in the emission model or in the consecutive air quality modelling. The selection of either one of these options depends at least on the spatial scale of the modelling. In local scale air quality studies it may be more reasonable to apply the emissions as they are measured directly from the stack (or after the fastest aerosol processes have taken place). For regional scale studies, the PM emissions after some specified'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003397, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Receptor model intercomparison studies for urban PM2.5 source allocation using MEIC database'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文本强调车辆排放是城市PM2.5污染的主要来源之一，与其他源如工业燃煤锅炉和施工扬尘相比，在大型和中型城市中相关性最显著。,理由是高价值证据，直接与空气污染物来源相关，提供了多个引用线索如Zhu et al. (2018) 用于源分配研究。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Vehicle emissions', 'Source apportionment']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020). The source analysis and control method of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. There is a close relationship between  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution and vehicle emissions in many urban areas of large and medium cities (Hajmohammadi et al., 2019; Xiao et al., 2019). The main sources of particulate matter in various regions of China were identified by Zhu et al. (2018) through source apportionment studies'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002970, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为二次人为源对OVOCs贡献稳定主因大气氧化能力增强（珠三角O₃浓度上升）抵消了前体物减排效果，形成动态平衡。,理由是阐明二次生成机制的重要见解，但缺乏具体数值支撑，需结合其他证据构成完整图景。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary anthropogenic sources', 'Atmospheric oxidizing capacity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'sources to OVOCs did not decrease significantly over the six-year study period, which indicated the OVOC formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors. Previous studies have shown that atmospheric oxidizing capacity was strong in the PRD region, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ , one of important atmospheric oxidizing substances, was on the rise in this region in recent years, which may strongly transform VOC to OVOCs and SOA (Wang et al., 2020; Gong et al., 2018; Xue et al., 2014). Therefore, the relatively stable contribution of secondary anthropogenic sources over the six years could be explained by a net effect of the increased atmospheric oxidizing capacity and decreased primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002913, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为本文采用改进的de Gouw光化学老化模型分析OVOCs来源，模型引入$m$和$ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$参数，将OVOCs划分为一次人为源、二次人为源、生物源和区域背景浓度四类来源。,理由是核心模型描述强相关但未展示具体数据结果，需保留作方法背景。Wang/Han/Huang的多次引用增强可信度。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['photochemical-age-based parametric methods', 'primary anthropogenic sources', 'ER_bb']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'photochemical aging developed by de Gouw et al. (2005) has the advantage of not requiring emission inventories and considers the photochemical reactions and consumption processes of OVOCs (Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019, 2020). OVOC concentrations are attributed to primary anthropogenic sources, secondary anthropogenic sources, biogenic sources and the regional-scale background concentrations as described in equation (1), originally proposed by de Gouw et al. (2005), modified here with the addition of terms  $m$  and  $ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$  as used in previous studies in this region (Wang et al., 2017, Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019; 2020):'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003515, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical mechanisms of secondary OVOCs formation and validation techniques in PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5 mitigation intensifies O3 pollution in the North China Plain by suppressing radical termination reactions (e.g., involving HO2 and N2O5), as reduced particle surfaces enhance photochemical processes, with studies showing O3 increases from 2013-2017.,理由是Directly relevant to the core problem, highlighting pollution mechanisms and trade-offs in northern China with specific temporal references and citations, which offer deep dive potential for winter-specific analyses.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HO2 radicals', 'radical termination', 'photochemical enhancement']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In addition,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution can be intensified by  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  mitigation through the reaction pathway affecting the termination of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation chemistry. Reduced particle surfaces, where the heterogeneous reactions involving atmospheric oxidants occur, may lead to termination reactions of some  $\\mathrm{O_3}$ -consuming radicals (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{N}_2\\mathrm{O}_5$  and  $\\mathrm{HO}_2$ ) [58,59]. The reduced  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  suppresses the termination reactions of those radicals, thus enhancing the photochemical reactions and  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations. Li et al. [60] found that the suppressed aerosol sink of hydroperoxyl  $(\\mathrm{HO}_2)$  radicals, due to the decrease of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  over the 2013-2017 period, was an important factor in the increase of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  in the North China Plain.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Vehicle emissions are a key source of urban PM2.5 pollution, contributing to respiratory diseases and visibility issues in cities like Wuhan, alongside industrial and construction sources, as per China-wide apportionment studies.,理由是Addresses broader PM2.5 sources and health impacts, which may contextualize the urban environment but is not focused on northern China's winter coal heating or seasonal mechanisms; specializes in vehicle emissions rather than core focus.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['source apportionment', 'vehicle emissions', 'health impacts']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020). The source analysis and control method of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. 证据节点ID: chunk_003994, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据识别排放因子不确定性是工业源清单的主要瓶颈，并强调基于工厂数据和现场测量的需求来提高地方尺度排放估算精度。,理由是高价值证据，为计算不确定性问题提供解决方案线索，如引述plant-based方法和需求更多调查。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission factor uncertainty', 'Plant-based method']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'information on emission factors was identified to be crucial for the uncertainties of emissions for those source categories. The results indicated the importance of better understanding on emission characteristics of individual plants when emission inventory was developed using a "plant-based" method. Such experience could be extended to other regions/cities with similar economic and industrial structures. Due to lack of sufficient field measurements, however, the plant-specific emission factors for all species were still unavailable at local spatial scale for other industrial sources, and technology-based emission factors had to be assigned for all the plants of the same manufacturing technology types, without independent uncertainty assumptions. Moreover, the uncertainty analysis for sectors other than industry at provincial and city scales could hardly be improved, as data from current available statistics or investigations could not better differentiate the emission characteristics by source type or provide detailed information on errors of activity data and emission factors. Those limitations motivated more detailed on-site investigations and field measurements on typical emission sources for further improving the emission estimates at local scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001206, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过高速公路上下风浓度差实测验证，发现基于台架测试的排放模型在气态/颗粒物排放计算中存在精度局限。,理由是提供模型验证方法论（上下风测量法），但未给出具体差异数据或改进方案，宜作为背景参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['upwind-downwind measurement', 'emission source strength']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The quality of an emission calculation model based on emission factors measured on roller test stands and statistical traffic data was evaluated using source strengths and emission factors calculated from real-world exhaust gas concentration differences measured upwind and downwind of a motorway in southwest Germany. Gaseous and particulate emissions were taken into account. Detailed traffic census data were taken during the measurements. The results were compared with findings of similar studies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002987, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'SPECIATE database applications in anthropogenic emission characterization'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为讨论亚洲排放清单（MIX）在整合不同源数据时面临的地理范围、时间分辨率和分类体系差异问题。,理由是内容聚焦排放清单格式标准化，与有机排放化学机制分配的直接关联性弱。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'different inventories and providing emission data with uniform format. Available emission inventories always differ in geographic region, time period, source classification, species, and spatial and temporal resolution, introducing complexities in intercomparisons of emissions and model results with different emission inputs. By involving the state-of-the-art local emission inventories developed with local knowledge and harmonizing them to uniform format, this approach can provide a reference on magnitude and spatial distribution of emissions for different regions, while there is always tradeoff in spatial-temporal coverage and resolution due to inconsistencies among involved inventories.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002916, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为光化学老化模型的三个基础假设：OVOC排放与示踪物比例关系、日间OH自由基主导消耗、生物源与异戊二烯排放成比例。,理由是通用方法假设描述，未提供地域特异性数据或新发现，信息价值较低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'When using photochemical-age-based parametric methods to analyze the sources of OVOCs, de Gouw et al. (2005) proposed the following assumptions: (1) anthropogenic emissions of OVOCs and their precursors are in direct proportion to the selected tracers of primary emissions; (2) OVOCs are mainly scavenged by reactions with OH radicals during the daytime; and (3) the biogenic source of OVOCs is proportional to the emission of isoprene. Therefore, the uncertainty of the method mainly depends on the effectiveness of the selected tracer, the assumed stable emission ratio and the simplified variability of VOC properties (de Gouw et al., 2005). In this study, some modifications were made to the equation based on the above assumptions to make the model more suitable for the'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003017, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC模型提供月尺度排放数据（0.25°网格），经网站自定义元数据生成，MIX中按四大部门聚合（电力/工业/居民/交通）。,理由是描述排放模型技术细节，与PM2.5污染控制关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC model', 'Sectoral aggregation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC delivers monthly emissions at various spatial resolutions through an open-access, online framework (http://www.meicmodel.org). Monthly variations and gridded emissions were generated by sector using different temporal profiles and spatial proxies. Users can define the metadata (species, domain range, time period, sectors, spatial resolution, and chemical mechanisms), calculate gridded emissions, and download data from the website. Monthly emissions at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  generated from MEIC v1.0 (referred to as MEIC hereafter) were used in MIX. Emissions were aggregated to four MIX sectors: power, industry, residential, and transportation.  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$  emissions in MEIC were replaced by PKU-  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ , which will be discussed in the next section.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'At present, tackling the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  issue is the most challenging due to its complex formation, with contributions from multiple precursors and sources. Air quality management in China has thus'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003501, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2013年北京PM2.5来源解析显示：本地源占比66%（机动车31%/燃煤22%/工业18%）强调区域协同治理必要性,理由是量化核心污染源贡献率助力措施优先级设计，引用实证监测数据论文42,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 source apportionment', 'mobile sources contribution', 'regional transport effect']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'atmospheric chemistry. Furthermore,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution would not have been successfully controlled without coordinated efforts from surrounding provinces. Thus, the government experienced valuable learning regarding the source apportionment of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollutions. The results from an analysis of one-year continuous monitoring data indicated that local sources were actually responsible for about two thirds of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  mass concentrations in Beijing for 2013. Among local contributors, mobile sources (primarily on-road vehicles) were estimated to play a leading role  $(31\\%)$ , followed by coal combustion  $(22\\%)$ , industrial production  $(18\\%)$ , and dust  $(15\\%)$  [42].'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002806, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文本描述排放空间分配的代理方法，如道路网络用于移动源和人口密度用于居住源，以弥补点源位置不精确的问题。,理由是中等价值证据，与排放模型相关但仅提供一般方法概述，无明确深挖路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Spatial proxies', 'Grid allocation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Many methods for allocating regional emission totals to grids are available. The most accurate approach involves allocating emissions for which the actual latitude-longitude coordinates of the emitting facilities (e.g., power plants or cement plants) are available. For mobile and area sources (i.e., sources for which the exact emission locations are unknown), parameters of so-called spatial proxies must be used to represent the spatial distributions of emissions. For example, emissions from road transportation sources can be allocated based on road networks, and residential emissions that are strongly related to human activities can be gridded using population densities or nighttime lights (Streets et al., 2003; Woo et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009; Oda et al., 2011). In many cases, industrial emissions are also allocated by proxies because of the limited information available.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Emissions from mobile sources are calculated as the product of fuel consumption and the emission factor expressed as emitted pollutant per unit fuel consumption.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The scope of this final paper within the special issue on the results of the BAB II project is (i) to summarise the main results, (ii) to compare the measured and model-calculated source strengths of emissions, released by traffic on the motorway section under investigation and finally to evaluate the quality of the emission calculation model updated by the results of the traffic census made simultaneously. Although emission factors for a "mean vehicle" depending on the fleet composition passing the measurement site are given, the main objective is the improvement of the emission model by reliable traffic data and not by updated emission factors. These can not be estimated by the method used in BAB II, because the model needs emission factors of individual vehicle types (motors) as input data rather than emission factors valid for a fleet of vehicles passing the site randomly distributed. The remaining differences between measured and model-calculated source strengths is therefore mainly attributed to imprecise or even missing emission factors for gases, NMHC compounds and particulates from roller test stands.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None
```

```
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2013年京津冀PM2.5年均值超标2-3倍，小时峰值达800μg/m³；2012年新国标采用WHO-IT1（年均35μg/m³）并建立监测网,理由是揭示PM2.5政策转折点与污染基线，卫星AOD数据可用于重建历史浓度，高价值对比材料,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['NAAQS implementation', 'AOD-PM2.5 correlation', 'BTH haze episode']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "High  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, which are known as haze episodes, frequently hit many Chinese cities in winter, significantly deteriorating visibility and harming people's health. However,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  was not officially listed in China's NAAQS until the amendment in 2012, when China adopted the WHO Interim Target-1 level  $(35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3})$  as the annual mean limit for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. Since then, an official  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  monitoring network has been gradually established to diagnose more ground-level  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, with hourly results available to the public. In 2013,  $96\\%$  of the 74 key cities in China did not meet the NAAQS annual  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. The most polluted cities were located in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei (BTH) region, where the annual averages were 2-3 times the limit. During a serious haze pollution episode in January 2013, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations were recorded as high as  $800\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [14]. Image spectroradiometers onboard satellites provided the measurement of aerosol optical depth (AOD), which is used to characterize continuous trends in ground-level"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002903, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据揭示甲醛等低碳OVOCs通过光解产生OH自由基影响大气氧化性，并参与产生臭氧(如北京研究中羰基化合物O₃生成潜势达166.1μg/m³，是BTEX的2.5倍)。同时证明OVOCs与呼吸系统健康风险关联。,理由是核心论述OVOCs的环境与健康双重作用，提供定量数据及多篇关键文献引用（Zhang/Shou/Zhu等），具明确深挖价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Formaldehyde photolysis', 'O3 formation potential', 'Carbonyl compounds toxicity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "Previous studies have proven that some low-carbon OVOCs (formaldehyde and acetaldehyde) can generate OH radicals and hydroperoxyl radicals  $\\mathrm{(HO_2)}$  through photolysis to affect the oxidizing capacity of the atmosphere (Volkamer et al., 2010; Shao et al., 2011; Xue et al., 2016). OVOCs can also participate in photochemical reactions and contribute to the generation of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  and SOA (Louie et al., 2013; Ehn et al., 2014). In addition, as most OVOCs are highly water soluble, they can be absorbed into the human body, irritating the eyes, skin and respiratory tract, thus harming human health. OVOCs such as formaldehyde, acetaldehyde, acetone and acrolein have been shown to pose serious health risks (WHO, 2000, Delfino et al., 2003; Bashkin, 2009; Du et al., 2014). Given the important role of OVOCs in photochemical reactions and the complexity of their sources, OVOCs have been the subject of extensive research recently (Sahu et al., 2017; Maji et al., 2020), especially in China, where air pollution is severe (Zhang et al., 2012, 2015; Zhou et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019). Zhang et al. (2012) studied the pollution characteristics of BTEX (benzene, toluene, ethylbenzene, m,p-xylene and o-xylene) and carbonyl compounds during summer in Beijing and found that the  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation potential of carbonyl compounds  $(166.1~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$  was approximately 2.5 times that of BTEX  $(65.4~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3)$ . Zhou et al. (2019) used proton transfer reaction mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) to measure VOCs in Xi'an and used the positive matrix factorization (PMF) model to analyze over 30 types of VOCs and identify eight primary sources and found that local emissions, such as industrial processes, solvent usage, residential biofuel use and vehicular exhaust, contributed about  $70\\%$  of the VOCs measured. Zhu et al. (2019) used PTR-MS to monitor OVOCs during different seasons and applied photochemical age parameter analysis to evaluate the sources of OVOCs in Shenzhen. They found that primary anthropogenic sources were the most important source of OVOCs in urban areas of China."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Volatile organic compounds (VOCs) are important precursors that can undergo atmospheric photochemical reactions with nitrogen oxides  $\\left(\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}\\right)$  under ultraviolet radiation to produce secondary products such as ozone  $\\left(\\mathrm{O}_{3}\\right)$  and peroxyacetyl nitrate (PAN) and form photochemical smog (Derwent et al., 2003; Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are a class of VOCs with oxygen-containing functional groups, mainly composed of aldehydes, ketones, and alcohols. The concentrations of atmospheric OVOCs vary greatly in different regions. Studies in clean marine areas showed that although phytoplankton in the marine may release OVOCs, such as methanol, acetaldehyde and acetone, their ambient air mixing ratios were usually only a few'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究显示MOVES、COPERT等主流车辆排放模型与中国实测排放因子存在显著差异，尤其是高排放车辆的控制装置老化问题被系统性低估。,理由是直接对比多种排放模型与实测数据，指出关键差异点，并引用多篇对比研究（Fujita2012/Liu2015），具有深度挖掘价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MOVES model', 'high emitters', 'deterioration of emission control']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "Accurate vehicle emission factors are essential to recognize their contribution to air pollution. Vehicle emission models, such as MOVES, COPERT, EMFAC, and IVE, have been widely used to develop vehicle emission inventory in previous studies (Wang et al., 2008; Wallace et al., 2012; Cai and Xie, 2013; Jing et al., 2016). In China, the MEP (Ministry of Environmental Protection of People's Republic of China) released an on-road vehicle emission inventory guidebook (shorten as EI guidebook) which recommended a series of vehicular emission factors based on the local studies (MEP, 2014). However, some measurements on LDGVs demonstrated that the modeled emission factors still have some differences with the measured ones (Fujita et al., 2012; Liu and Frey, 2015). Most of the results from real world measurements by remote sensing and chasing studies indicated that high emitters caused by deterioration of emission control devices tended to be underestimated in"}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002815, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为亚洲排放清单使用人口密度和电厂经纬度作为空间代理分配排放量，CARMA数据库扩大了电厂定位覆盖范围。,理由是聚焦固定源排放空间分配方法，与车辆移动源排放因子核心议题关联弱，未提供模型验证关键信息。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'INTEX-B (Zhang et al., 2009), Regional Emission inventory in Asia (REAS) version 1 (Ohara et al., 2007), and REAS version 2 (Kurokawa et al., 2013), as shown in Table 1. In bottom-up inventories, spatial proxies are usually sector dependent and shared across different species. In general, all of these inventories rely on similar approaches to allocate emissions from combustion sources. Emissions from large-capacity power generation units are typically allocated according to their latitude-longitude information, which is the most accurate way to distribute emissions, whereas the population density is used to distribute emissions from small power plants whose locations are unknown (Streets et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009). Recently, power plant locations from the Carbon Monitoring for Action (CARMA) database (Wheeler and Ummel, 2008) are used to locate emissions (Kurokawa et al., 2013), providing a larger dataset of power plants than previous work. However, the ac'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003524, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Receptor model intercomparison studies for urban PM2.5 source allocation using MEIC database'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5 concentrations decreased by an average of 23% across Chinese cities from 2013-2017, with Beijing reducing pollution from 89 μg/m³ to 58 μg/m³, demonstrating effective emission controls as benchmark for northern efforts.,理由是Core-related evidence showcasing quantifiable PM2.5 reduction trends in northern China, particularly Beijing, during the winter pollution period, with actionable data for further study of seasonal variations.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 reduction', 'socioeconomic decoupling', 'Beijing controls']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'the regional or national level. During the Action Plan 2013-2017, many cities effectively decoupled  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and socioeconomic development.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations deceased by an average of  $23\\%$  during this period for all municipal cities in China. Beijing has set a successful example as a pioneer in energy transition and transportation emission controls, and has achieved significant progress in mitigating  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution from  $89~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2013 to  $58~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2017.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002902, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为OVOCs浓度范围：清洁地区pptv级，污染区ppbv级；来源包括直接人为排放（溶剂/车辆）、生物源排放及NMHCs光化学氧化。,理由是基础背景知识重复叙述，无新数据或地域特徵分析，可剪除。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'to a few hundred pptv (Galbally et al., 2007; Colomb et al., 2009; Wohl et al., 2020), while the concentrations of OVOCs in polluted areas can be as high as dozens of ppbv (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016; Sheng et al., 2018; Zhou et al., 2019; Maji et al., 2020). The variation in OVOC concentrations is due to the wide variety and complexity of sources of OVOCs. OVOCs can be directly emitted by anthropogenic sources, e.g., solvent volatilization, vehicle emissions (Legreid et al., 2007; Ou et al., 2015), and biogenic sources (Jacob et al., 2002; Mellouki et al., 2015). In addition, OVOCs can also be formed as secondary products by photochemical oxidation of nonmethane hydrocarbons (NMHCs) from anthropogenic and biogenic sources (Yuan et al., 2012; Liu et al., 2015).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002899, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2019年深圳OVOCs浓度干季增13%，2015-2019年从30.3ppb降至18.7ppb；人为源贡献占32-51%，污染控制使一次人为源降50-60%但未改善二次生成OVOCs,理由是包含关键数据：长期浓度趋势、季节特征、具体源贡献率及污染控制措施效果，且指出二次污染未受控的核心问题,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['secondary OVOCs formation', 'anthropogenic reduction efficacy', 'photochemical age parameterization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are important precursors and intermediate products of atmospheric photochemical reactions, which can promote the formation of secondary pollutants such as ozone  $(\\mathrm{O}_3)$  and secondary organic aerosol (SOA). However, there have been few studies on the sources of and long-term variation in ambient OVOCs. This study combined sensitive, near real-time measurements of VOCs by proton transfer reaction-mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) with an improved photochemical age parameterization method to quantify daytime sources of OVOCs in an urban atmosphere in China from 2014 to 2019, permitting the observation of the impacts of emission control strategies that were implemented during this period. Temporal variation in six key OVOCs (methanol, acetaldehyde, acetone, methyl ethyl ketone (MEK), formic acid, and acetic acid) were observed. The sum of concentrations of OVOCs was averagely  $13\\%$  higher during the dry season (November to April), when winds transported polluted air masses to Shenzhen from the continent, than during the wet season, and peak diurnal levels occurred during the daytime year-round due to photochemical production and higher daytime anthropogenic emissions. The average dry season concentration of OVOCs declined from a peak of 30.3 ppb in 2015 to 18.7 ppb in 2019. The results of source apportionment showed that primary anthropogenic sources contributed the most to methanol, MEK, and acetic acid  $(32 - 51\\%)$ ; the dominant sources of acetaldehyde and formic acid were both primary and secondary anthropogenic sources; and biomass burning contributed a small fraction  $(5 - 11\\%)$  to the six OVOCs. From 2014 to 2019, contributions from primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased significantly by  $50 - 60\\%$  due to intensive pollution control measures in Shenzhen, whereas pollution control measures had no observable impact on secondary OVOCs, indicating their formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002296, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为船舶尾气PM排放建模中气溶胶快速变化导致局部与区域尺度模拟需采用不同方案,理由是研究焦点为船只排放建模，与本项目中国大气污染治理主题无关,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The large variations in the experimentally determined emission factors of PM chemical components are probably caused to a large extent by the fast aerosol processes, which occur immediately, as the exhaust leaves the funnel. Significant changes in particle number concentrations, mass and composition can occur, which should be included either in the emission model or in the consecutive air quality modelling. The selection of either one of these options depends at least on the spatial scale of the modelling. In local scale air quality studies it may be more reasonable to apply the emissions as they are measured directly from the stack (or after the fastest aerosol processes have taken place). For regional scale studies, the PM emissions after some specified'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003397, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Receptor model intercomparison studies for urban PM2.5 source allocation using MEIC database'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文本强调车辆排放是城市PM2.5污染的主要来源之一，与其他源如工业燃煤锅炉和施工扬尘相比，在大型和中型城市中相关性最显著。,理由是高价值证据，直接与空气污染物来源相关，提供了多个引用线索如Zhu et al. (2018) 用于源分配研究。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Vehicle emissions', 'Source apportionment']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020). The source analysis and control method of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. There is a close relationship between  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution and vehicle emissions in many urban areas of large and medium cities (Hajmohammadi et al., 2019; Xiao et al., 2019). The main sources of particulate matter in various regions of China were identified by Zhu et al. (2018) through source apportionment studies'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002970, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为二次人为源对OVOCs贡献稳定主因大气氧化能力增强（珠三角O₃浓度上升）抵消了前体物减排效果，形成动态平衡。,理由是阐明二次生成机制的重要见解，但缺乏具体数值支撑，需结合其他证据构成完整图景。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary anthropogenic sources', 'Atmospheric oxidizing capacity']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'sources to OVOCs did not decrease significantly over the six-year study period, which indicated the OVOC formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors. Previous studies have shown that atmospheric oxidizing capacity was strong in the PRD region, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O}_3$ , one of important atmospheric oxidizing substances, was on the rise in this region in recent years, which may strongly transform VOC to OVOCs and SOA (Wang et al., 2020; Gong et al., 2018; Xue et al., 2014). Therefore, the relatively stable contribution of secondary anthropogenic sources over the six years could be explained by a net effect of the increased atmospheric oxidizing capacity and decreased primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002913, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为本文采用改进的de Gouw光化学老化模型分析OVOCs来源，模型引入$m$和$ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$参数，将OVOCs划分为一次人为源、二次人为源、生物源和区域背景浓度四类来源。,理由是核心模型描述强相关但未展示具体数据结果，需保留作方法背景。Wang/Han/Huang的多次引用增强可信度。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['photochemical-age-based parametric methods', 'primary anthropogenic sources', 'ER_bb']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'photochemical aging developed by de Gouw et al. (2005) has the advantage of not requiring emission inventories and considers the photochemical reactions and consumption processes of OVOCs (Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019, 2020). OVOC concentrations are attributed to primary anthropogenic sources, secondary anthropogenic sources, biogenic sources and the regional-scale background concentrations as described in equation (1), originally proposed by de Gouw et al. (2005), modified here with the addition of terms  $m$  and  $ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$  as used in previous studies in this region (Wang et al., 2017, Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019; 2020):'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003515, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical mechanisms of secondary OVOCs formation and validation techniques in PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5 mitigation intensifies O3 pollution in the North China Plain by suppressing radical termination reactions (e.g., involving HO2 and N2O5), as reduced particle surfaces enhance photochemical processes, with studies showing O3 increases from 2013-2017.,理由是Directly relevant to the core problem, highlighting pollution mechanisms and trade-offs in northern China with specific temporal references and citations, which offer deep dive potential for winter-specific analyses.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['HO2 radicals', 'radical termination', 'photochemical enhancement']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'In addition,  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  pollution can be intensified by  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  mitigation through the reaction pathway affecting the termination of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  formation chemistry. Reduced particle surfaces, where the heterogeneous reactions involving atmospheric oxidants occur, may lead to termination reactions of some  $\\mathrm{O_3}$ -consuming radicals (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{N}_2\\mathrm{O}_5$  and  $\\mathrm{HO}_2$ ) [58,59]. The reduced  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  suppresses the termination reactions of those radicals, thus enhancing the photochemical reactions and  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  concentrations. Li et al. [60] found that the suppressed aerosol sink of hydroperoxyl  $(\\mathrm{HO}_2)$  radicals, due to the decrease of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  over the 2013-2017 period, was an important factor in the increase of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  in the North China Plain.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The atmospheric fine particulate matter  $(\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5})$  is a great contributor to air pollution, which not only affects the visibility of atmosphere, but also causes respiratory diseases (Martins and Graça, 2018; Shou et al., 2019; Kelp et al., 2020). The source analysis and control method of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. There is a close relationship between  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution and vehicle emissions in many urban areas of large and medium cities (Hajmohammadi et al., 2019; Xiao et al., 2019). The main sources of particulate matter in various regions of China were identified by Zhu et al. (2018) through source apportionment studies'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003994, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据识别排放因子不确定性是工业源清单的主要瓶颈，并强调基于工厂数据和现场测量的需求来提高地方尺度排放估算精度。,理由是高价值证据，为计算不确定性问题提供解决方案线索，如引述plant-based方法和需求更多调查。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission factor uncertainty', 'Plant-based method']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'information on emission factors was identified to be crucial for the uncertainties of emissions for those source categories. The results indicated the importance of better understanding on emission characteristics of individual plants when emission inventory was developed using a "plant-based" method. Such experience could be extended to other regions/cities with similar economic and industrial structures. Due to lack of sufficient field measurements, however, the plant-specific emission factors for all species were still unavailable at local spatial scale for other industrial sources, and technology-based emission factors had to be assigned for all the plants of the same manufacturing technology types, without independent uncertainty assumptions. Moreover, the uncertainty analysis for sectors other than industry at provincial and city scales could hardly be improved, as data from current available statistics or investigations could not better differentiate the emission characteristics by source type or provide detailed information on errors of activity data and emission factors. Those limitations motivated more detailed on-site investigations and field measurements on typical emission sources for further improving the emission estimates at local scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001206, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过高速公路上下风浓度差实测验证，发现基于台架测试的排放模型在气态/颗粒物排放计算中存在精度局限。,理由是提供模型验证方法论（上下风测量法），但未给出具体差异数据或改进方案，宜作为背景参考。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['upwind-downwind measurement', 'emission source strength']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The quality of an emission calculation model based on emission factors measured on roller test stands and statistical traffic data was evaluated using source strengths and emission factors calculated from real-world exhaust gas concentration differences measured upwind and downwind of a motorway in southwest Germany. Gaseous and particulate emissions were taken into account. Detailed traffic census data were taken during the measurements. The results were compared with findings of similar studies.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002987, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'SPECIATE database applications in anthropogenic emission characterization'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 4, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为讨论亚洲排放清单（MIX）在整合不同源数据时面临的地理范围、时间分辨率和分类体系差异问题。,理由是内容聚焦排放清单格式标准化，与有机排放化学机制分配的直接关联性弱。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'different inventories and providing emission data with uniform format. Available emission inventories always differ in geographic region, time period, source classification, species, and spatial and temporal resolution, introducing complexities in intercomparisons of emissions and model results with different emission inputs. By involving the state-of-the-art local emission inventories developed with local knowledge and harmonizing them to uniform format, this approach can provide a reference on magnitude and spatial distribution of emissions for different regions, while there is always tradeoff in spatial-temporal coverage and resolution due to inconsistencies among involved inventories.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'When using photochemical-age-based parametric methods to analyze the sources of OVOCs, de Gouw et al. (2005) proposed the following assumptions: (1) anthropogenic emissions of OVOCs and their precursors are in direct proportion to the selected tracers of primary emissions; (2) OVOCs are mainly scavenged by reactions with OH radicals during the daytime; and (3) the biogenic source of OVOCs is proportional to the emission of isoprene. Therefore, the uncertainty of the method mainly depends on the effectiveness of the selected tracer, the assumed stable emission ratio and the simplified variability of VOC properties (de Gouw et al., 2005). In this study, some modifications were made to the equation based on the above assumptions to make the model more suitable for the'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003017, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC模型提供月尺度排放数据（0.25°网格），经网站自定义元数据生成，MIX中按四大部门聚合（电力/工业/居民/交通）。,理由是描述排放模型技术细节，与PM2.5污染控制关联度低。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC model', 'Sectoral aggregation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC delivers monthly emissions at various spatial resolutions through an open-access, online framework (http://www.meicmodel.org). Monthly variations and gridded emissions were generated by sector using different temporal profiles and spatial proxies. Users can define the metadata (species, domain range, time period, sectors, spatial resolution, and chemical mechanisms), calculate gridded emissions, and download data from the website. Monthly emissions at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  generated from MEIC v1.0 (referred to as MEIC hereafter) were used in MIX. Emissions were aggregated to four MIX sectors: power, industry, residential, and transportation.  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$  emissions in MEIC were replaced by PKU-  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ , which will be discussed in the next section.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'At present, tackling the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  issue is the most challenging due to its complex formation, with contributions from multiple precursors and sources. Air quality management in China has thus'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003501, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2013年北京PM2.5来源解析显示：本地源占比66%（机动车31%/燃煤22%/工业18%）强调区域协同治理必要性,理由是量化核心污染源贡献率助力措施优先级设计，引用实证监测数据论文42,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 source apportionment', 'mobile sources contribution', 'regional transport effect']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'atmospheric chemistry. Furthermore,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution would not have been successfully controlled without coordinated efforts from surrounding provinces. Thus, the government experienced valuable learning regarding the source apportionment of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollutions. The results from an analysis of one-year continuous monitoring data indicated that local sources were actually responsible for about two thirds of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  mass concentrations in Beijing for 2013. Among local contributors, mobile sources (primarily on-road vehicles) were estimated to play a leading role  $(31\\%)$ , followed by coal combustion  $(22\\%)$ , industrial production  $(18\\%)$ , and dust  $(15\\%)$  [42].'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002806, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为文本描述排放空间分配的代理方法，如道路网络用于移动源和人口密度用于居住源，以弥补点源位置不精确的问题。,理由是中等价值证据，与排放模型相关但仅提供一般方法概述，无明确深挖路径。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Spatial proxies', 'Grid allocation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Many methods for allocating regional emission totals to grids are available. The most accurate approach involves allocating emissions for which the actual latitude-longitude coordinates of the emitting facilities (e.g., power plants or cement plants) are available. For mobile and area sources (i.e., sources for which the exact emission locations are unknown), parameters of so-called spatial proxies must be used to represent the spatial distributions of emissions. For example, emissions from road transportation sources can be allocated based on road networks, and residential emissions that are strongly related to human activities can be gridded using population densities or nighttime lights (Streets et al., 2003; Woo et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009; Oda et al., 2011). In many cases, industrial emissions are also allocated by proxies because of the limited information available.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------

                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为移动源排放的计算依赖燃料消耗量和每个污染物的单位排放因子乘积公式。,理由是内容涉及排放计算基础方法，但无具体数值或深挖路径（如特定案例研究），适合作为上下文。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Mobile sources emissions', 'Fuel consumption', 'Emission factor calculation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Emissions from mobile sources are calculated as the product of fuel consumption and the emission factor expressed as emitted pollutant per unit fuel consumption.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_001213, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为基于BAB II项目的实证表明，交通排放模型差异主要源于台架测试获取的单车排放因子不准确，而非车队平均排放因子问题。,理由是揭示了模型误差根源（单车vs车队排放因子），为方法论缺陷提供重要佐证，但缺乏具体数据支持深度挖掘。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['roller test stands', 'source strengths', 'BAB II project']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The scope of this final paper within the special issue on the results of the BAB II project is (i) to summarise the main results, (ii) to compare the measured and model-calculated source strengths of emissions, released by traffic on the motorway section under investigation and finally to evaluate the quality of the emission calculation model updated by the results of the traffic census made simultaneously. Although emission factors for a "mean vehicle" depending on the fleet composition passing the measurement site are given, the main objective is the improvement of the emission model by reliable traffic data and not by updated emission factors. These can not be estimated by the method used in BAB II, because the model needs emission factors of individual vehicle types (motors) as input data rather than emission factors valid for a fleet of vehicles passing the site randomly distributed. The remaining differences between measured and model-calculated source strengths is therefore mainly attributed to imprecise or even missing emission factors for gases, NMHC compounds and particulates from roller test stands.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002827, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据表明点源排放位置的准确性显著影响化学运输模型预测空气污染物的精度，并使用单位级排放数据集覆盖中国约6400个发电unit。,理由是高价值证据，包含数据集引用Liu et al. (2015) 和模型优化线索，建议挖掘详细排放源位置。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Unit-based emission dataset', 'Chemical transport models']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Our previous study revealed that the locations of large point sources in emission inventories significantly affect the prediction accuracy of the chemical transport models (Wang et al., 2012). A third dataset (S3) is used to investigate the effects of using the exact locations of emissions from large point sources. S3 is based on S1 but consists of a unit-based power plant emission dataset including the locations of  $\\sim 6400$  power generation units across China (Liu et al., 2015) to override power sector emissions.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002961, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical mechanisms of secondary OVOCs formation and validation techniques in PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为Primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased by 50-60% from 2014 to 2019 in southern China, with methanol concentrations dropping most significantly by 7 ppb, while secondary sources showed no notable changes, indicating precursor abundance.,理由是The evidence discusses OVOCs in southern China, which deviates from the core problem of PM2.5/PM10 pollution in northern China's winter and lacks direct seasonal or regional alignment with coal heating; OVOCs are not the primary pollutant of focus.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['OVOCs', 'primary anthropogenic sources', 'methanol emission']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'the OVOC concentrations in 2014). From 2014 to 2019, the ambient concentration of OVOCs contributed by primary anthropogenic sources decreased significantly, declining by  $50 - 60\\%$ . Among the six OVOC species, the species with the largest decrease in concentration attributed to primary anthropogenic sources was methanol, which decreased by 7 ppb. However, contributions of the other sources to the absolute concentrations of OVOCs did not significantly change over the six-year period. Specifically, annual variations in secondary anthropogenic sources were not significant, indicating that secondary formation of atmospheric OVOCs in this region might be restricted by the atmospheric oxidizing capacity and that precursor emissions are more than abundant.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None
```

```
- 结果 1（ID: chunk_003481）：

  - 摘要/内容: High  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, which are known as haze episodes, frequently hit many Chinese cities in winter, significantly deteriorating visibility and harming people's health. However,  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  was not officially listed in China's NAAQS until the amendment in 2012, when China adopted the WHO Interim Target-1 level  $(35\mu \mathrm{g}\cdot \mathrm{m}^{-3})$  as the annual mean limit for  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. Since then, an official  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  monitoring network has been gradually established to diagnose more ground-level  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, with hourly results available to the public. In 2013,  $96\%$  of the 74 key cities in China did not meet the NAAQS annual  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. The most polluted cities were located in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei (BTH) region, where the annual averages were 2-3 times the limit. During a serious haze pollution episode in January 2013, hourly  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations were recorded as high as  $800\mu \mathrm{g}\cdot \mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [14]. Image spectroradiometers onboard satellites provided the measurement of aerosol optical depth (AOD), which is used to characterize continuous trends in ground-level


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_003524）：

  - 摘要/内容: the regional or national level. During the Action Plan 2013-2017, many cities effectively decoupled  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and socioeconomic development.  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations deceased by an average of  $23\%$  during this period for all municipal cities in China. Beijing has set a successful example as a pioneer in energy transition and transportation emission controls, and has achieved significant progress in mitigating  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution from  $89~\mu \mathrm{g}\cdot \mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2013 to  $58~\mu \mathrm{g}\cdot \mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2017.

The results from an analysis of one-year continuous monitoring data indicated that local sources were actually responsible for about two thirds of  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  mass concentrations in Beijing for 2013. The source analysis and control method of  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  are research hotspots around the world (Mukherjee and Agrawal, 2018; Jiang et al., 2019; Lv et al., 2019). Studies have already shown that flue gas emitted from industrial coal-fired boilers (Li et al., 2017; Yao et al., 2019), soil dust of construction site (Chen et al., 2017) and vehicle emissions (Liu et al., 2019; Saraga et al., 2019; Zhang et al., 2019a, b) are the mainly  $\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources. Monthly variations and gridded emissions were generated by sector using different temporal profiles and spatial proxies. Users can define the metadata (species, domain range, time period, sectors, spatial resolution, and chemical mechanisms), calculate gridded emissions, and download data from the website. Monthly emissions at  $0.25^{\circ} \times 0.25^{\circ}$  generated from MEIC v1.0 (referred to as MEIC hereafter) were used in MIX. Emissions were aggregated to four MIX sectors: power, industry, residential, and transportation.  $\mathrm{NH}_3$  emissions in MEIC were replaced by PKU-  $\mathrm{NH}_3$ , which will be discussed in the next section.

```

**LLM Response**:
```

该策略旨在通过比较城市尺度的受体模型进行PM2.5源解析精度研究，重点依托MEIC数据库评估中国Top20城市污染趋势。实际检索内容主要包含三类核心信息：  
**1. 中国重点城市PM2.5污染实证**  
结果2和4提供了北京及全国Top20城市2013-2018年浓度变化的关键数据，如北京PM2.5从89μg/m³降至58μg/m³，全国平均下降23%，并附有年度趋势可视化图表（结果4）。  
**2. 典型城市源解析案例**  
结果3具体量化了2013年北京PM2.5本地源贡献：移动源（31%）、燃煤（22%）、工业（18%）和扬尘（15%），揭示了城市尺度源分配特征。  
**3. 关键污染源识别**  
结果7-8指出机动车排放是中型以上城市的核心污染源（与工业燃煤、施工扬尘并列），结果10则补充了MEIC数据库的排放处理机制，如NH₃排放替代方案和0.25°网格化技术。  
  
值得注意的是，虽策略聚焦受体模型比较，但直接模型精度验证内容未检出，最相关线索为结果3的源解析实例和结果10的排放处理技术，可作为模型应用场景的有效佐证。
```
