- 检索参数: {'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}

- 策略设计原因: 该节点指出车辆样本量不足导致排放因子偏差，评估人员推荐'emission inventory big data'关键词，需开发大样本方法学提升移动源分配的准确性

- 结果数量统计: 共找到 10 条结果，其中重复 2 条


## 该策略下的全部检索结果（供你全面总结和评估）

- 结果 1（ID: chunk_003805）：

  - 摘要/内容: Emissions from mobile sources are calculated as the product of fuel consumption and the emission factor expressed as emitted pollutant per unit fuel consumption.


- 结果 2（ID: chunk_002804）：

  - 摘要/内容: Emission inventories are essential for predicting spatial and temporal variations in air pollutants and for helping policy makers develop pollution control strategies. The traditional way of developing an emission inventory is the bottom-up approach, whereby activity rates and emission factors are aggregated for all known sources (e.g., Streets et al., 2003; Zhang et al., 2009). Emission inventories are most commonly estimated as emission totals of municipal districts

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: 文本概括底部向上方法（bottom-up approach）是构建排放清单的传统方式，用于预测空气污染物的时空变化和支持污染控制策略。

  - 评估理由: 中等价值证据，提供背景知识但未引入具体深挖路径或新线索。


- 结果 3（ID: chunk_002827）：

  - 摘要/内容: Our previous study revealed that the locations of large point sources in emission inventories significantly affect the prediction accuracy of the chemical transport models (Wang et al., 2012). A third dataset (S3) is used to investigate the effects of using the exact locations of emissions from large point sources. S3 is based on S1 but consists of a unit-based power plant emission dataset including the locations of  $\sim 6400$  power generation units across China (Liu et al., 2015) to override power sector emissions.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 证据表明点源排放位置的准确性显著影响化学运输模型预测空气污染物的精度，并使用单位级排放数据集覆盖中国约6400个发电unit。

  - 评估理由: 高价值证据，包含数据集引用Liu et al. (2015) 和模型优化线索，建议挖掘详细排放源位置。


- 结果 4（ID: chunk_002987）：

  - 摘要/内容: different inventories and providing emission data with uniform format. Available emission inventories always differ in geographic region, time period, source classification, species, and spatial and temporal resolution, introducing complexities in intercomparisons of emissions and model results with different emission inputs. By involving the state-of-the-art local emission inventories developed with local knowledge and harmonizing them to uniform format, this approach can provide a reference on magnitude and spatial distribution of emissions for different regions, while there is always tradeoff in spatial-temporal coverage and resolution due to inconsistencies among involved inventories.


- 结果 5（ID: chunk_002806）：

  - 摘要/内容: Many methods for allocating regional emission totals to grids are available. The most accurate approach involves allocating emissions for which the actual latitude-longitude coordinates of the emitting facilities (e.g., power plants or cement plants) are available. For mobile and area sources (i.e., sources for which the exact emission locations are unknown), parameters of so-called spatial proxies must be used to represent the spatial distributions of emissions. For example, emissions from road transportation sources can be allocated based on road networks, and residential emissions that are strongly related to human activities can be gridded using population densities or nighttime lights (Streets et al., 2003; Woo et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009; Oda et al., 2011). In many cases, industrial emissions are also allocated by proxies because of the limited information available.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: 文本描述排放空间分配的代理方法，如道路网络用于移动源和人口密度用于居住源，以弥补点源位置不精确的问题。

  - 评估理由: 中等价值证据，与排放模型相关但仅提供一般方法概述，无明确深挖路径。


- 结果 6（ID: chunk_003994）：

  - 摘要/内容: information on emission factors was identified to be crucial for the uncertainties of emissions for those source categories. The results indicated the importance of better understanding on emission characteristics of individual plants when emission inventory was developed using a "plant-based" method. Such experience could be extended to other regions/cities with similar economic and industrial structures. Due to lack of sufficient field measurements, however, the plant-specific emission factors for all species were still unavailable at local spatial scale for other industrial sources, and technology-based emission factors had to be assigned for all the plants of the same manufacturing technology types, without independent uncertainty assumptions. Moreover, the uncertainty analysis for sectors other than industry at provincial and city scales could hardly be improved, as data from current available statistics or investigations could not better differentiate the emission characteristics by source type or provide detailed information on errors of activity data and emission factors. Those limitations motivated more detailed on-site investigations and field measurements on typical emission sources for further improving the emission estimates at local scales.

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 证据识别排放因子不确定性是工业源清单的主要瓶颈，并强调基于工厂数据和现场测量的需求来提高地方尺度排放估算精度。

  - 评估理由: 高价值证据，为计算不确定性问题提供解决方案线索，如引述plant-based方法和需求更多调查。


- 结果 7（ID: chunk_001992）：

  - 摘要/内容: Accurate vehicle emission factors are essential to recognize their contribution to air pollution. Vehicle emission models, such as MOVES, COPERT, EMFAC, and IVE, have been widely used to develop vehicle emission inventory in previous studies (Wang et al., 2008; Wallace et al., 2012; Cai and Xie, 2013; Jing et al., 2016). In China, the MEP (Ministry of Environmental Protection of People's Republic of China) released an on-road vehicle emission inventory guidebook (shorten as EI guidebook) which recommended a series of vehicular emission factors based on the local studies (MEP, 2014). However, some measurements on LDGVs demonstrated that the modeled emission factors still have some differences with the measured ones (Fujita et al., 2012; Liu and Frey, 2015). Most of the results from real world measurements by remote sensing and chasing studies indicated that high emitters caused by deterioration of emission control devices tended to be underestimated in

  - 评估动作: GROW

  - 评估要点: 研究显示MOVES、COPERT等主流车辆排放模型与中国实测排放因子存在显著差异，尤其是高排放车辆的控制装置老化问题被系统性低估。

  - 评估理由: 直接对比多种排放模型与实测数据，指出关键差异点，并引用多篇对比研究（Fujita2012/Liu2015），具有深度挖掘价值。


- 结果 8（ID: chunk_001213）：

  - 摘要/内容: The scope of this final paper within the special issue on the results of the BAB II project is (i) to summarise the main results, (ii) to compare the measured and model-calculated source strengths of emissions, released by traffic on the motorway section under investigation and finally to evaluate the quality of the emission calculation model updated by the results of the traffic census made simultaneously. Although emission factors for a "mean vehicle" depending on the fleet composition passing the measurement site are given, the main objective is the improvement of the emission model by reliable traffic data and not by updated emission factors. These can not be estimated by the method used in BAB II, because the model needs emission factors of individual vehicle types (motors) as input data rather than emission factors valid for a fleet of vehicles passing the site randomly distributed. The remaining differences between measured and model-calculated source strengths is therefore mainly attributed to imprecise or even missing emission factors for gases, NMHC compounds and particulates from roller test stands.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: 基于BAB II项目的实证表明，交通排放模型差异主要源于台架测试获取的单车排放因子不准确，而非车队平均排放因子问题。

  - 评估理由: 揭示了模型误差根源（单车vs车队排放因子），为方法论缺陷提供重要佐证，但缺乏具体数据支持深度挖掘。


- 结果 9（ID: chunk_002815）：

  - 摘要/内容: INTEX-B (Zhang et al., 2009), Regional Emission inventory in Asia (REAS) version 1 (Ohara et al., 2007), and REAS version 2 (Kurokawa et al., 2013), as shown in Table 1. In bottom-up inventories, spatial proxies are usually sector dependent and shared across different species. In general, all of these inventories rely on similar approaches to allocate emissions from combustion sources. Emissions from large-capacity power generation units are typically allocated according to their latitude-longitude information, which is the most accurate way to distribute emissions, whereas the population density is used to distribute emissions from small power plants whose locations are unknown (Streets et al., 2003; Ohara et al., 2007; Zhang et al., 2009). Recently, power plant locations from the Carbon Monitoring for Action (CARMA) database (Wheeler and Ummel, 2008) are used to locate emissions (Kurokawa et al., 2013), providing a larger dataset of power plants than previous work. However, the ac

  - 评估动作: PRUNE

  - 评估要点: 亚洲排放清单使用人口密度和电厂经纬度作为空间代理分配排放量，CARMA数据库扩大了电厂定位覆盖范围。

  - 评估理由: 聚焦固定源排放空间分配方法，与车辆移动源排放因子核心议题关联弱，未提供模型验证关键信息。


- 结果 10（ID: chunk_001206）：

  - 摘要/内容: The quality of an emission calculation model based on emission factors measured on roller test stands and statistical traffic data was evaluated using source strengths and emission factors calculated from real-world exhaust gas concentration differences measured upwind and downwind of a motorway in southwest Germany. Gaseous and particulate emissions were taken into account. Detailed traffic census data were taken during the measurements. The results were compared with findings of similar studies.

  - 评估动作: KEEP

  - 评估要点: 通过高速公路上下风浓度差实测验证，发现基于台架测试的排放模型在气态/颗粒物排放计算中存在精度局限。

  - 评估理由: 提供模型验证方法论（上下风测量法），但未给出具体差异数据或改进方案，宜作为背景参考。


## 你的输出要求

1. 只针对这一条策略本身进行总结，不要讨论系统整体流程。
2. 以“这个策略想解决什么问题，它实际检索到了哪些类型的内容”为主线进行归纳。
3. 重点描述内容层面的共同主题、重要信息和潜在有价值线索，尽量引用上面给出的标题、摘要和洞察。
4. 使用一到两段自然语言即可，语言简洁清晰，不要列清单式要点。
5. 不要输出任何 JSON 或列表结构，只输出自然语言段落。

```

**LLM Response**:
```

该策略旨在解决因车辆样本量不足导致的排放因子偏差问题，试图通过"emission inventory big data"关键词开发大样本方法学以提升移动源分配的准确性。实际检索内容主要呈现三大核心主题：  

首先，多篇证据（如结果3/6/7）共同揭示排放模型与实测数据的显著差异是影响精度的关键瓶颈。结果7通过对比MOVES、COPERT等主流模型与中国实际测量数据，发现高排放车辆因控制装置老化问题被系统性低估（基于Fujita2012/Liu2015的研究）。结果3则证明点源位置精度直接影响化学传输模型表现，引用了覆盖6400个中国发电单位的精细化数据集（Liu2015），而结果6进一步指出工业源需依托"plant-based"方法获取工厂级排放因子。  

其次，空间分配方法学成为重要补充（结果5/8）。对于无法精确定位的移动源，研究采用道路网络（道路源）和人口密度（居住源）等空间代理分配技术；结果8则通过德国高速公路实测（上下风浓度差法）验证了台架测试获取单车排放因子的局限性。这些内容与策略目标形成直接呼应——结果6中强调"现场调查和典型源测量"的呼吁，以及结果7对"本地化排放因子指南（MEP2014）仍需优化"的结论，均为提升移动源排放代表性提供了具体改进方向。
```

## [17:40:19] InteractionSummaryAgent: SUMMARY_LOG
**Summary**: 本轮总结: 
### PM2.5源解析方法检索过程总结

针对用户问题——“PM2.5来源解析的主要方法和技术是什么？”（原始输入：What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?）——检索系统在第五轮进行了深度分析，旨在全面探索相关技术及其验证方式。以下以逻辑清晰的顺序（问题背景→检索策略→结果→评估→洞察）进行总结，便于快速掌握核心信息。

#### 1. **用户问题背景**
- **核心焦点**：本次检索聚焦于识别PM2.5源解析的主流方法（如化学分析、模型应用等），以及其技术实现细节（如验证机制和数据不确定性处理）。
- **检索轮次**：这是第五轮检索，持续深化查询，确保信息覆盖多个关键维度。

#### 2. **检索策略与应用**
检索系统采用了多策略组合，以覆盖不同解析技术的子领域：
- **策略1：光化学机制验证方法**  
  - **查询意图**：探讨二次有机挥发性化合物（OVOCs）形成的光化学参数化及其验证技术（例如大气氧化能力影响）。
  - **原因**：该节点揭示OVOCs的稳定贡献需定量验证方法, 以增强模型精度。执行语义搜索, 生成10条结果（其中7条为已知重复）。
- **策略2：源排放不确定性量化方法**  
  - **查询意图**：通过元数据搜索深挖Lu2011和Zhao2011文献中的排放因子不确定性分类。
  - **原因**：评估建议需缓解排放因子量化方法的空白。但未能找到新结果（0条返回），显示此方面数据不足。
- **策略3：城市级模型比较**  
  - **查询意图**：分析使用MEIC数据库的城市PM2.5受体模型互校研究。
  - **原因**：中国Top20城市数据（如北京PM2.5浓度变化）触及模型精度差异问题。语义搜索发现10条结果（7条重复），包括高分文档（relevance=9）。
- **策略4：移动源排放量分析**  
  - **查询意图**：改进移动源排放因子的统计代表性方法。
  - **原因**：车辆样本量不足是误差源头, 关键提示开发“emission inventory big data”方法论。语义搜索返回10条结果（仅2条重复），含growth-level见解（relevance=8）。

**整体策略逻辑**：这些方法互补覆盖了解析技术的核心领域——包括动态机理验证、模型比较和不确定性控制。共计处理30条新结果，结合轮次积累提升信息完整性。

#### 3. **检索结果与评估分析**
本轮检索产出134条条目（高：54条; 中：42条; 低：38条）, 系统评估显示高价值内容充裕，但中等和低价值部分（如重复性内容）提示信息筛选需优化。
- **相关性评估**：高比例结果直接关联问题(如策略3中relevance=9的文档，详述城市PM2.5下降23%的实证), 但策略2无输出影响平均相关性。
- **准确性评估**：权威引用（如Lu2011表9, Dong2019建模）能保证数据基础, 但排放因子实测偏差（如柴油车NOx超模型37%）警告不一致风险。
- **权威性评估**：专业来源主导（如公开数据库http://www.cert.ucr.edu/~carter/emitdb）, 但部分低价值条目（如表3重复证据）削弱信效度。
- **完整性评估**：覆盖广泛(1700+化合物), 缺乏排放因子量化方法细节形成薄弱点。
总体上，检索为问题提供高贡献(用于深化知识和支持决策的工具链), 中等价值数据集需进一步结构化。

#### 4. **关键洞察总结**
核心发现突出源解析方法的多样性与技术挑战：
- **方法学创新**：开发了综合分配数据库（覆盖1700+化合物），整合统一分类系统，并为用户提供公开工具链优化解析流程。
- **技术应用实证**：LMDI分解法(Eq.3引用Li2021)成功量化PM2.5浓度多因子影响；实证表明排放因子不确定性是主要误差源（如船舶排放量化关系新增维度）。
- **整体优化方向**：需强化排放因子验证方法(如策略2空白),并通过大数据提升移动源分配精度。

本次检索有效解构了PM2.5源解析方法的关键框架, 服务于后续知识迁移。如需词云数据或深入分析说明, 可进一步生成可视化支持。...

**技术应用实证**：LMDI分解法(Eq.3引用Li2021)成功量化PM2.5浓度多因子影响；实证表明排放因子不确定性是主要误差源（如船舶排放量化关系新增维度）。\n- **整体优化方向**：需强化排放因子验证方法(如策略2空白),并通过大数据提升移动源分配精度。\n\n本次检索有效解构了PM2.5源解析方法的关键框架, 服务于后续知识迁移。如需词云数据或深入分析说明,         # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003897
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_003897", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of anthropogenic atmospheric pollutants in China\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emiss.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 135, \"content_length\": 1047, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_019"}
            Content: {"text": "the study, particularly outside of the coal-fired power sector, identify specific limitations of available literature and data concerning emission factors, activity levels, and even technology distributions in China. Future regional differentiation of those input parameters will further reduce uncertainties. Improved quantification of emissions of the included species and other, closely associated ones – notably  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ , generated largely by the same processes and thus subject to many of the same parameter uncertainties – is essential not only for science but for design of policies to redress critical atmospheric environmental hazards at local, regional, and global scales. Among these are photochemical smog, ecosystem acidification, and global climate change. Data collection and analysis of relevant parameters to narrow emission uncertainties, moreover, must be sustained, as these parameters are inevitably evolving as China's rapid growth restructures its economy, transforms its industries, and urbanizes its population."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002904
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) in an urban atmosphere in southern China, 2014-2019\\\\*\", \"md_filename\": \"Long-term observations of oxygenated volatile orga.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 26, \"content_length\": 1436, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_002904", "paperid": "paper_014", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "Shenzhen is located in China's Pearl River Delta (PRD) urban agglomeration, a region where rapid urbanization and industrialization have led to serious, complex atmospheric pollution (Sin et al., 2001; He et al., 2011). With the implementation of strict environmental protection measures in recent years, the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentration in Shenzhen has decreased significantly. From 2013 to 2019, the average value of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in Shenzhen was reduced from 40 to  $24~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3$  (Ecological Environment Bureau of Shenzhen Municipality, 2019). However, due to the high temperatures and high solar radiation characteristics of this region, atmospheric photochemical reactions are active, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  was increasing at an average annual rate of 0.7 ppb from 2014 to 2018 (Wang et al., 2020), such that  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  is replacing  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  as the primary atmospheric pollutant in the region (Huang et al., 2019). Several previous short-term studies have observed the diurnal and seasonal patterns of OVOCs and identified their sources in this region (Liu et al., 2008; Liu et al., 2012; Louie et al., 2013; Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019); however, this is the first long-term study of OVOCs that permits the observation of interannual variability and long-term changes, in particular those related to emission reduction measures."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002558
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_007", "chunkid": "chunk_002558", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measures co-benefited China in  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  reduction and health from 2014 to 2020\", \"md_filename\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measu.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 33, \"content_length\": 697, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "only available at the national level. Therefore, we assumed that the death rates and age structure is homogeneous in mainland China refers to previous studies (Anenberg, 2010; Stanaway, 2018). Finally, we used a country-scale adjustment factor (McDuffie et al., 2021; Stanaway et al., 2018) to separate the deaths attributable to ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  from the total deaths attributable to ambient and household  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  according to the study of McDuffie et al (2021). The adjustment factor (Table S2) is calculated by comparing the national-scale deaths derived for all particulate matter pollution to deaths related to ambient particulate matter pollution only in GBD 2019."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003330
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_003330", "paperid": "paper_024", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"On-road emissions of fine particles and associated chemical components from motor vehicles in Wuhan, China\", \"md_filename\": \"On-road emissions of fine particles and associated.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 15, \"content_length\": 1218, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "published in 1987-2017. This study found that transportation was one of the main source categories, and generally dust and industrial contributions decreased and transportation contributions increased after 2000. A review of receptor-based source apportionment research of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in China suggested that secondary sources and traffic emission had higher contribution in South China while coal combustion, dust and biomass burning were higher in North China (Zhang et al., 2017). A review about the source apportionment of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in South Korea showed that motor vehicle and soil dust were identified as the main factors in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution (Ryou et al., 2018). EPA PMF 5.0 was used to make assessment on  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  sources in Patras, and it was found that vehicle emissions contributed to nearly  $34\\%$  (Manousakas et al., 2017). Li et al. (2019) found that the vehicle emissions contributed to  $22.7\\%$  of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in Beijing in 2016. Since the dust of construction site can be controlled effectively, the proportion of vehicle emissions in  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in urban areas will increase gradually with the rising number"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003991
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_012", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission inventory for industrial sources: From national to provincial and city scales\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 121, \"content_length\": 673, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_003991"}
            Content: {"text": "Uncertainties of multi-scale emission inventories based on different methods and data sources were quantified with a modified Monte-Carlo simulation framework for mainland China, Jiangsu, and Nanjing. Although the completeness of data were improved from national to provincial and city scales, the uncertainties of total emissions were not significantly reduced for most species, with an exception of  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ . Nevertheless, the emission uncertainties of certain species for given sources (e.g.,  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$  and  $\\mathrm{NO_X}$  from power plants and other industrial boilers) were reduced at local scales compared to those at national scale. Plant-specific"}

### [17:42:29] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

**User Prompt**:
```
请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002630
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measures co-benefited China in  $\\\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  reduction and health from 2014 to 2020\", \"md_filename\": \"How the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measu.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 110, \"content_length\": 2819, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_007", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_002630"}
            Content: {"text": "We provide a comprehensive estimation of the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and the number of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths, as well as spatiotemporal changes in these, and a quantitative assessment of the effectiveness of ACP methods in mainland China during 2014 to 2020. The two key contributions are: (1) We estimated the spatiotemporal variation in the number of deaths attributable to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  exposure in mainland China during ACP based on the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  product with the finest spatial resolution available to date, and elucidated the spatial discrepancies in policy implementation across China. China's recent clean air actions have achieved great benefits for human health and the environment. However, over  $98\\%$  of the population still lived under the risk of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution ( $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations over  $15\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ), with 1.12 million ( $95\\%$  CI: 0.79-1.56) premature deaths caused by  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in mainland China in 2020, accounting for  $\\sim 27.05\\%$  of global ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths. In addition, the environmental and health benefits of China ACP are not fully synergistic in spatial pattern, with the greatest health benefits detected in the YRD region and the best environment benefits identified in the BTH region. To achieve the co-benefits of environment and health, specific policies need to be adopted under different conditions. (2) We quantified the environment and health co-benefits of ACP measures and carbon mitigation from 2014 to 2020. Clean production was the most effective abatement measure in China ACP, reducing net  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and net premature deaths by  $18.35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  and 0.45 million, respectively. The co-effects of  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  contributed to a  $23\\%$  and  $26\\%$  decrease in the number of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and premature deaths and became one of the major drivers for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and premature deaths reduction in the APWBSD phase. This confirms the clear environment and health co-benefits of carbon mitigation measures. Meanwhile, the effectiveness of process and source control measures reduced during 2018 to 2020. With the exhaustion of end-of-pipe and energy consumption control measures, the future air clean actions should focus more on carbon abatement and energy structure optimization, especially under the background of global climate change mitigation. In addition to mitigation in industrial and energy sectors, it is also critical to explore more cost-effective approaches (e.g., agricultural ammonia mitigation) (Zhou et al., 2021; Gu et al., 2021) for pollution control in other sectors."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003031
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_003031", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"MIX: a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission inventory under the international collaboration framework of the MICS-Asia and HTAP\", \"md_filename\": \"MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 67, \"content_length\": 804, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_013"}
            Content: {"text": "where  $k$  is the region,  $m$  is species type in CB05 or SAPRC-99 mechanisms, and  $n$  is the number of species emitted from source  $i$ . EVOC is the total NMVOC emissions by source type. In this work, emissions in China and other Asian countries were derived from MEIC and REAS2 respectively.  $X(i,j)$  is the mass fraction of species  $j$  in the total NMVOC emissions for source  $i$ , which is taken from the profiles developed by Li et al. (2014). Those profiles were constructed by grouping and averaging multiple profiles from both local measurements and the SPECIATE database (Hsu and Divita, 2009; Simon et al., 2010).  $\\mathrm{Mol}(j)$  is the mole weight of species  $j$  and  $C(j,m)$  is the conversion factor between  $j$  and  $m$  obtained from the mapping tables in Carter (2013)."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002983
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_013", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"MIX: a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission inventory under the international collaboration framework of the MICS-Asia and HTAP\", \"md_filename\": \"MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 9, \"content_length\": 899, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_002983", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "The Model Inter-Comparison Study for Asia (MICS-Asia) project is currently in phase III. During the previous two phases, studies have been focused on long-range transport and deposition of pollutants, global inflow of pollutants to Asia, model sensitivities to aerosol parameterization, and emissions over Asia (Carmichael et al., 2002, 2008; Han et al., 2008; Hayami et al., 2008; Holloway et al., 2008; Wang et al., 2008). MICS-Asia Phase III aims to conduct further intercomparisons of atmospheric modeling for Asia and analyze the disagreement of model output and relative uncertainties. In this regard, common meteorological fields, emission data, and boundary conditions should be used. One of the key tasks in MICS-Asia Phase III is to develop a reliable Asian emission inventory as common input for model intercomparisons through integration of state-of-the-art knowledge on Asian emissions."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_002981
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"type": "texture", "paperid": "paper_013", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"MIX: a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission inventory under the international collaboration framework of the MICS-Asia and HTAP\", \"md_filename\": \"MIX_ a mosaic Asian anthropogenic emission invento.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 6, \"content_length\": 919, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_002981"}
            Content: {"text": "Abstract. The MIX inventory is developed for the years 2008 and 2010 to support the Model Inter-Comparison Study for Asia (MICS-Asia) and the Task Force on Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP) by a mosaic of up-to-date regional emission inventories. Emissions are estimated for all major anthropogenic sources in 29 countries and regions in Asia. We conducted detailed comparisons of different regional emission inventories and incorporated the best available ones for each region into the mosaic inventory at a uniform spatial and temporal resolution. Emissions are aggregated to five anthropogenic sectors: power, industry, residential, transportation, and agriculture. We estimate the total Asian emissions of 10 species in 2010 as follows:  $51.3\\mathrm{TgSO}_2$ ,  $52.1\\mathrm{TgNO}_x$ ,  $336.6\\mathrm{TgCO}$ ,  $67.0\\mathrm{TgNMVOC}$  (non-methane volatile organic compounds),  $28.8\\mathrm{TgNH}_3$"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_000135
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"A long-term estimation of biogenic volatile organic compound (BVOC) emission in China from 2001-2016: the roles of land cover change and climate variability\", \"md_filename\": \"A long-term estimation of biogenic volatile organi.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 144, \"content_length\": 1036, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_004", "chunkid": "chunk_000135", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "which has been described in Sect. 3.2, and it is clear that southern China is the region with the strongest positive trend. For HCHO, developed regions such as the North China Plain have an increasing trend because of the increase in human activities (Smedt et al., 2010), there is also an obvious increasing trend of HCHO VC at Yunnan and Guangxi provinces in the south of China. Moreover, these regions, especially Guangxi Province, also show a statistically significant positive correlation between isoprene emission and HCHO VC as presented in Fig. 9d. This implies that biogenic emissions might be the main driver of the increased HCHO in Guangxi Province; however, the absence of physical and chemical processes like transport led to a large uncertainty to this conclusion. Here we conducted a primary comparison between HCHO VC and isoprene emission, and a more thorough study by using a chemical transport model may help to further explain the relationship between the variability of HCHO VC and isoprene emission in the future."}
            

```

### [17:43:10] Evaluator: LLM Interaction

**System Message**:
```

        # 角色定义
        你是团队中的【验证人员】（实验室研究生），你们团队正在进行针对某个问题的科学文献调研。
        你们的首席科学家会制定调研的方向，根据那个方向已经搜索出了许多证据，你的任务是对搜索出来的每一条证据进行【单点评估】。
        你的证据会被提交给首席科学家，首席科学家会根据你的评估结果，进行下一步的决策。如果做的好，首席科学家会给你涨工资，你要好好工作。
        
        # 评估逻辑
        请仔细阅读证据的标题、总结和洞察，**如果有图片，请务必结合图片内容进行视觉判断**。
        
        1. **判定动作 (branch_action)**:
           - **GROW**: 高价值证据。与问题强相关，且包含进一步深挖的线索（如具体的 Paper ID，关联表格，或者图表展示了极具价值的数据趋势）。
           - **KEEP**: 中等价值。与问题相关，但可能只是背景介绍，或者没有明显的深挖路径。保留作为上下文。
           - **PRUNE**: 低价值。与问题无关，或者信息过于模糊/重复/低质。直接剪除。
        
        2. **信息提取 (extracted_insight)**:
           - 不要只说“这张图很好”。要说“这张图展示了 PM2.5 在冬季与呼吸道疾病发病率呈正相关”。
        
        3. **术语猎捕 (suggested_keywords)**:
           - 如果发现文中使用了特殊的专有名词（如 "VolumeSTCube", "CNN-LSTM"），请提取出来，供首席科学家扩展搜索。
        
        # 输出格式 (JSON List)
        必须返回一个 JSON 列表，包含所有传入证据的评估结果。不要包含 Markdown 标记。
        
        [
          {
            "target_evidence_id": "fig_001",
            "branch_action": "GROW",
            "extracted_insight": "图表显示 2018 年北京地区 PM2.5 浓度峰值对应哮喘急诊人数峰值。",
            "scores":{"relevance": 9, "credibility": 8},
            "reason": "这是一张关键趋势图，且 Metadata 中包含源论文 ID, 建议深挖该论文。",
            "suggested_keywords": ["Time-series analysis", "Asthma emergency visits"]
          }
        ]
        
```

**User Prompt**:
```
请对以下新检索到的证据进行单点评估（JSON List 格式）：

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003881
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_003881", "paperid": "paper_019", "type": "texture", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of anthropogenic atmospheric pollutants in China\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emiss.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 117, \"content_length\": 1122, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "The situations for emission factors with higher reliability (i.e., A and B) are more complicated. For coal-fired power plants, the data on which the probability distributions for most parameters are fitted are obtained from both thorough field measurements by the authors and published studies by others (see details in Zhao et al., 2010). These support different emission factors across burner types, fuel qualities, and emission control levels. The uncertainty analysis for this sector are thus the most reliable in this study. Such confidence, however, does not apply to the residential sector, particularly biomass burning, even though the emission factors meet A or B criteria. As discussed in Sect. 4.1, the data on which the distributions are based are limited in number and systematic bias may result in this sector. In other words, the reliability of uncertainty analysis of biomass burning is in fact poor despite the statistical strength of data fitting. Given its high contributions to uncertainties in emission estimates, more field measurements of emissions from biomass burning in China are urgently needed."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003883
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"chunkid": "chunk_003883", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of anthropogenic atmospheric pollutants in China\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emiss.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 119, \"content_length\": 84, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "paperid": "paper_019", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "# 4.4 Emission uncertainty of power plants: comparison between sector and unit level"}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003871
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_019", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_003871", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of anthropogenic atmospheric pollutants in China\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emiss.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 106, \"content_length\": 246, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "In addition to estimating uncertainty, sensitivity analysis are conducted using Monte Carlo simulation. The results are expressed as contributions of parameter uncertainties to the variance of emissions by sector and species, as shown in Table 2."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003789
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"paperid": "paper_019", "type": "texture", "chunkid": "chunk_003789", "metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emission inventory of anthropogenic atmospheric pollutants in China\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of a bottom-up emiss.md\", \"paragraph_index\": 17, \"content_length\": 869, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}"}
            Content: {"text": "To better understand the uncertainties of atmospheric pollutant emissions, Frey and Zheng (2002) developed a bootstrap simulation method and analyzed the uncertainties of  $\\mathrm{NO}_{\\mathrm{x}}$  emission factors and emissions of coal-fired power plants of different technology types. This method was then applied to other species and sectors (Frey and Li, 2003; Frey and Zhao, 2004). Based on bootstrap and Monte Carlo simulations, an emission factor database for Chinese coal-fired power plants has been established with detailed categories of combustion technologies and fuel qualities (Zhao et al., 2010). Such methods have proven difficult to apply to even one region of China due to lack of supporting data (Zheng et al., 2009), and they have never been previously used to evaluate the uncertainties of an integrated emission inventory for the entire country."}
            

            --- Evidence Item ---
            ID: chunk_003907
            Source Tool: Left_Path(Semantic)
            Metadata: {"metadata": "{\"paper_title\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission inventory for industrial sources: From national to provincial and city scales\", \"md_filename\": \"Quantifying the uncertainties of China's emission .md\", \"paragraph_index\": 25, \"content_length\": 1802, \"chunk_type\": \"text\"}", "chunkid": "chunk_003907", "paperid": "paper_012", "type": "texture"}
            Content: {"text": "making in pollution mitigation. Recently the focus on China's emissions is in particular rising, as the country contains a wide variety of emissions sources, relatively large emission intensities, and fast changes in temporal and spatial patterns of emissions, attributed to the swift growth of economy and to the multiple measures of emission controls. At continental/national scale, various inventories have been developed including the one for Intercontinental Chemical Transport Experiment-Phase B (INTEX-B, Zhang et al., 2009), the Emissions Database for Global Atmospheric Research (EDGAR, JRC/PBL, 2011), the Regional Emission inventory in Asia (REAS, Ohara et al., 2007; Kurokawa et al., 2013), and the Multi-resolution Emission Inventory for China (MEIC, http://www.meicmodel.org/). Resulting from different methods and data sources, discrepancies existed between inventories and the model performances varied significantly when they were applied in CTM (Saikawa et al., 2017), motivating the uncertainty analysis of current inventories. Compared to earlier studies based mainly on expert judgment (Streets et al., 2003; Zhang et al., 2009; Lei et al., 2011a), Monte-Carlo simulation have been applied to quantify the uncertainties of emissions more carefully, and reduced uncertainty could be expected (Zhao et al., 2011, 2013; Lu et al., 2011). In those studies, emission factors (emissions per unit of energy consumption or industrial/agricultural production) were the main sources of uncertainties attributed mainly to lack of domestic measurements on various sources. However, recent studies suggested that the uncertainty of China's energy statistics should be larger than expected, enhancing the uncertainty of emission estimation for the country (Guan et al., 2012; Hong et al., 2017)."}

## 关键洞察
- 开发了覆盖1700+化合物的多机制分配数据库，包含统一分类系统、生物/人为排放处理方案，并提供公开访问的配套工具链(http://www.cert.ucr.edu/~carter/emitdb)。
- 采用LMDI分解法将PM2.5浓度量化为多因子乘积模型（Eq.3），引用Dong2019和Li2021的研究基础。
- 实证锁定排放因子不确定度是模型误差主要来源（如柴油车NOx实测值超模型预估37%）
- 表3描述完全重复前项证据
- 该证据定义了评估模型中关键变量关系：PM排放与燃料硫含量及发动机负荷的量化关系，补充了船舶排放源解析维度

## 任务要求
1. 基于以上信息，生成一个全面、连贯的检索过程总结
2. 总结应包括用户问题、检索策略、检索结果、评估分析和关键洞察
3. 总结应逻辑清晰、重点突出，便于用户快速掌握问答核心
4. 使用自然、流畅的语言，避免过于技术性的表达
5. 总结长度适中，不要过长或过短

**LLM Response**:
```

### 检索过程总结

**用户问题**  
用户提出核心问题："What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?"（PM2.5源解析的主要方法和技术有哪些？），旨在系统了解污染来源解析的关键技术与方法体系。

**检索策略**  
在第6轮检索中，采用4项语义搜索策略，聚焦不同技术维度：  
1. **光化学老化模型验证**（针对京津冀区域）：评估光化学老化参数化方法在OVOCs源解析中的适用性，填补冬季气象条件数据空白。  
2. **化学组分趋势分析**（基于中国大城市2013–2018年数据）：挖掘PM2.5组分变化与污染源的关联，重点关注二次有机气溶胶（SOA）与前体物的量化关系。  
3. **排放因子不确定性量化**：解析发电/工业源排放因子的误差机制，改进受体模型（如PMF/CMB）输入数据精度。  
4. **多受体模型对比**（北方机动车贡献率）：对比PMF-CMB等模型结果，识别柴油/汽油车源解析的系统性偏差。  

**检索结果**  
- 本轮共获得40条结果，包含部分重复内容。  
- 关键成果覆盖三方面：  
  - **技术方法**：光化学老化模型成功应用于OVOCs源追踪；LMDI分解法量化PM2.5浓度多因子关联（引用Dong2019/Li2021）。  
  - **数据工具**：建成覆盖1700+化合物的源解析数据库（含公开工具链 http://www.cert.ucr.edu/~carter/emitdb ）。  
  - **误差机制**：实证表明排放因子不确定度是模型主要误差源（如柴油车NOx实测值超模型估测37%）。  

**评估分析**  
综合多轮检索质量评估：  
- **高价值结果占比41%**（61条）：集中于模型验证与不确定性分析，如蒙特卡洛模拟优化排放清单（INTEX-B/EDGAR等）。  
- **中等价值结果占比32%**（47条）：涵盖化学组分趋势等辅助证据。  
- **低价值结果占比27%**（41条）：存在重复或边缘数据（如表3完全重复前项证据）。  
整体相关性突出，权威性较强（引用国家监测中心及多篇高评分研究），但需补充船舶排放等细分源解析的完整性。

**关键洞察**  
1. **技术融合趋势**：光化学老化模型与受体模型（PMF/CMB）结合，显著提升OCVs源解析精度，尤其在北方冬季污染场景。  
2. **误差核心矛盾**：排放因子不确定性主导解析误差，需强化单厂实测和蒙特卡洛量化（如船舶排放与燃料硫含量的量化模型）。  
3. **动态验证需求**：化学组分年际变化揭示源解析需持续迭代，例如SOA生成机制与前体物关联的动态建模。  
4. **数据开源价值**：公开数据库及工具链（如emitdb）推动方法标准化，支持全球协作。  

本次检索锁定"排放因子优化"和"多模型协同"为未来重点，为PM2.5治理提供可落地的技术路径。

---

        # 任务整体介绍
        你是【首席科学家】，你处在一个科学知识发现团队中，你们团队的目标是以用户输入的初始问题为目标，深度并且广泛地进行论文调研，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        为了进行科学知识发现，你和你的团队根据已经搜索并且阅读的论文信息正在构建一棵【科研证据树】。
        # 团队整体介绍
        你所处的科学知识发现团队中，你是首席科学家，即实验室领导的身份。通过输出的检索任务，你负责把握整个团队进行论文文献调研的方向，你的作用非常重要。
        你的团队中有许多验证人员，即实验室研究生的身份。他们会根据你的检索策略去检索论文数据，阅读检索到的图片和文本，进行初步的总结，评估检索到的内容是否符合预期，对每一个结果是否应该进行扩展阅读提出建议，并且将结果反馈给你。
        你的团队中有若干思考人员，即实验室小导师的身份。他们是一个小团队，会负责根据验证人员的反馈，对检索到的内容进行深度思考，挖掘知识之间的关联，发现新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识，形成最终的科学回答报告。
        # 你的核心职责
        作为团队大脑，你不直接阅读原文，你的工作是**把握方向**：
        1.  **初始规划**：面对用户的新问题，你需要构思 3-5 个不同维度的切入点。
        2.  **动态决策**：根据【验证人员】（Evaluator）反馈的评估报告，决定这棵树该怎么长。
        3.  **方向把控**：你需要平衡【广度】（寻找新灵感）和【深度】（验证证据链）。

        # 决策逻辑：
        1. 继续检索时，你需要输出一系列策略的列表。每一个元素是一个策略，以字典的形式输出。
        2. 每个策略字典中，它首先有action固定为call_tool。
            ParentNode：int类型，你的决策可以来源于某一个搜索策略对应的节点，也可以来源于你综合所有结果进行的思考。这个属性命名为”ParentNode“。如果来源于节点，你应该将这个节点的ID作为ParentNode；如果是你综合考虑的结果，你将属性设置为"0"。
            tool_name：str类型。根据你选择的策略决定，是strategy_semantic_searchstrategy_metadata_search。
            args：dict类型。调用检索工具时需要的参数。根据你选择的策略决定，按照下面两种策略的要求去添加args具体的内容。
            reason：str类型。你选择这个策略的原因，不要太长。
        可选策略：
        1. 深度挖掘 (DEEPER - Exploitation)
        * 触发条件：验证人员报告某个节点是【DEEPER】（高价值），你查看验证人员的汇报，发现确实有所帮助，决定在这个论文的基础上进行进一步探索。深度挖掘策略时，策略的ParentNode必须是一个节点的ID。
        * 操作：返回给你的数据中包含 `paper_id`（论文ID）你可以选择paper_id去进行查询同一篇论文。在深度挖掘中你要严格使用你认为的ParentNode的信息，不能随意生成新的关键词。
        * 目的：将孤立的线索变成完整的证据链。
        * 参数：如果选择deeper策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_metadata_search，args中包含paper_id。
        2. 广度扩展 (BROADER - Exploration)**
        * 触发条件：
            1. 当前返回了大量被重复搜索的论文，说明该方向已经几乎彻底研究透彻，需要寻找新的可能的领域。 此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            2. 当前返回的论文数量过少，说明对应的搜索策略不能在数据库中找到支持的论文，或者是找到的论文与用户问题相关性太低。需要寻找新的可能的搜索条件。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为"0"。
            3. 针对某一条返回的检索和评估结果，验证人员提出了使用新的专业名词的建议，或者你查看后认为可以提炼出一个新的关键词进行检索。此时触发，ParentNode应该设置为对应节点的ID。
        * 操作：根据验证人员的建议或者你自己的判断，你可以选择使用新的专业名词或者新的关键词进行检索。
        * 目的：扩展搜索范围，寻找新的、有价值的、可验证的科学知识。
        * 参数：如果选择broader策略，你的返回中tool_name为strategy_semantic_search，query_intent是你决定的下一步用于检索的文本词句。
        生成每个策略前，请先在内部思考：1. 这个策略与用户原始问题的相关性打分（0-10）2. 这个策略与已有历史策略的新颖性（0-10）只有两项都≥7才允许输出。
        
        # 历史策略参考
        在生成新策略时，请参考已有的历史策略，避免重复，并尝试在已有策略的基础上进行创新和优化。系统会为你提供当前会话中的所有历史策略信息，帮助你做出更好的决策。
        
```

                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "High  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, which are known as haze episodes, frequently hit many Chinese cities in winter, significantly deteriorating visibility and harming people's health. However,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  was not officially listed in China's NAAQS until the amendment in 2012, when China adopted the WHO Interim Target-1 level  $(35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3})$  as the annual mean limit for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. Since then, an official  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  monitoring network has been gradually established to diagnose more ground-level  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations, with hourly results available to the public. In 2013,  $96\\%$  of the 74 key cities in China did not meet the NAAQS annual  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations. The most polluted cities were located in the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei (BTH) region, where the annual averages were 2-3 times the limit. During a serious haze pollution episode in January 2013, hourly  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations were recorded as high as  $800\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [14]. Moreover, these regions, especially Guangxi Province, also show a statistically significant positive correlation between isoprene emission and HCHO VC as presented in Fig. 9d. This implies that biogenic emissions might be the main driver of the increased HCHO in Guangxi Province; however, the absence of physical and chemical processes like transport led to a large uncertainty to this conclusion.                         这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Abstract. The MIX inventory is developed for the years 2008 and 2010 to support the Model Inter-Comparison Study for Asia (MICS-Asia) and the Task Force on Hemispheric Transport of Air Pollution (TF HTAP) by a mosaic of up-to-date regional emission inventories. Emissions are estimated for all major anthropogenic sources in 29 countries and regions in Asia. We conducted detailed comparisons of different regional emission inventories and incorporated the best available ones for each region into the mosaic inventory at a uniform spatial and temporal resolution. Emissions are aggregated to five anthropogenic sectors: power, industry, residential, transportation, and agriculture. We estimate the total Asian emissions of 10 species in 2010 as follows:  $51.3\\mathrm{TgSO}_2$ ,  $52.1\\mathrm{TgNO}_x$ ,  $336.6\\mathrm{TgCO}$ ,  $67.0\\mathrm{TgNMVOC}$  (non-methane volatile organic compounds),  $28.8\\mathrm{TgNH}_3$'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002683, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 6, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为MEIC v1.0提供2008/2010年中国0.25°网格化人为排放数据（含SO2、NOx、VOCs等），与MIX清单和EDGARv4.3互补构建HTAP全球排放,理由是说明排放清单数据源及融合方法，对模型研究有参考价值但无直接观测结果或趋势分析,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC inventory', 'HTAP mosaic', 'MIX harmonization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'MEIC is developed by Tsinghua University under an open-access model framework that provides model-ready emission data over China to support chemical transport models and climate models at different spatial resolution and time scale. In the MIX inventory, the MEIC v.1.0 data were used, which contain the anthropogenic emissions of China for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{NO}_x$ , CO, NMVOC,  $\\mathrm{NH}_3$ ,  $\\mathrm{CO}_2$ ,  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , PMcoarse, BC, and OC for the years 2008 and 2010 with monthly temporal variation at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$ . For India, MIX used the Indian emission inventory provided by ANL (Argonne National Laboratory) for  $\\mathrm{SO}_2$ , BC, and OC and REAS2.1 for other species. With the input from different regions, the MIX inventory provided harmonized emission data at  $0.25^{\\circ} \\times 0.25^{\\circ}$  grid resolution with monthly variation for both 2008 and 2010. The detailed mosaic process of the MIX inventory is documented in Li et al. (2015). Reported emissions from countries which are only partly covered by the MIX, like Russia, Turkmenistan, Uzbekistan and Kazakhstan were not taken up in the HTAP inventory and instead gap filling by EDGARv4.3 was used (see Sect. 2.2.4).'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003924, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'EMEP/EEA Guidebook methodologies for emission factor uncertainty classification'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为通过蒙特卡洛框架（10,000次模拟）量化分部门/物种排放不确定性，并基于方差贡献识别关键驱动参数,理由是提供完整的概率不确定性量化方法论，含关键参数识别机制,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Monte Carlo framework', 'variance contribution', 'uncertainty drivers']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'activity levels and emission factors with corresponding statistical distributions are then placed in the Monte Carlo framework, and 10,000 simulations are performed to analyze the uncertainties of emissions by sector and species. Parameters that were most significant in determining uncertainties were identified according to their contributions to the variance of emissions.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_002558, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical age parameterization validation in Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 5, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究采用国家级统一死亡率和年龄结构假设，结合GBD调整因子分离环境PM2.5死亡率，存在空间均质化处理的局限性。,理由是方法论描述过于泛化，未提供具体地域健康影响数据或新颖分析框架。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'only available at the national level. Therefore, we assumed that the death rates and age structure is homogeneous in mainland China refers to previous studies (Anenberg, 2010; Stanaway, 2018). Finally, we used a country-scale adjustment factor (McDuffie et al., 2021; Stanaway et al., 2018) to separate the deaths attributable to ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  from the total deaths attributable to ambient and household  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  according to the study of McDuffie et al (2021). The adjustment factor (Table S2) is calculated by comparing the national-scale deaths derived for all particulate matter pollution to deaths related to ambient particulate matter pollution only in GBD 2019.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

证据节点ID: chunk_003524, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Receptor model intercomparison studies for urban PM2.5 source allocation using MEIC database'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为PM2.5 concentrations decreased by an average of 23% across Chinese cities from 2013-2017, with Beijing reducing pollution from 89 μg/m³ to 58 μg/m³, demonstrating effective emission controls as benchmark for northern efforts.,理由是Core-related evidence showcasing quantifiable PM2.5 reduction trends in northern China, particularly Beijing, during the winter pollution period, with actionable data for further study of seasonal variations.,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['PM2.5 reduction', 'socioeconomic decoupling', 'Beijing controls']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'the regional or national level. During the Action Plan 2013-2017, many cities effectively decoupled  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and socioeconomic development.  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations deceased by an average of  $23\\%$  during this period for all municipal cities in China. Beijing has set a successful example as a pioneer in energy transition and transportation emission controls, and has achieved significant progress in mitigating  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution from  $89~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2013 to  $58~\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  in 2017.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002633, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Receptor model techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究使用1km分辨率PM2.5数据（图S3-S4）与MR-BRT模型量化2014-2020年中国减排政策协同效益，相比传统方法解决高暴露不确定性并排除吸烟干扰。,理由是核心创新：揭示政策协同效益机制，提供高精度数据源（Wang 2021-2022）和新方法（MR-BRT），含关键图表引用。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MR-BRT model', 'Co-benefit quantification', '1km PM2.5 mapping']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Our analysis of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  attributed deaths in China was compared with several recent studies (Table S3). Great progresses was made in previous studies (Zhang et al., 2019a; Li et al., 2019; Ding et al., 2019; McDuffie et al., 2021; Liu et al., 2017; Zou et al., 2019; Apte et al., 2015), albeit with several limitations in common: (1) previous studies focused mainly on the APPCAP (2013-2017) and lack the updated results of the APWBSD (2018-2020); (2) the chemical transport model was used widely in previous research, which showed advantages for predicting the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations without ground measurement, but also has limitations in terms of prediction accuracy (Ma et al., 2022); (3) the Integrated Exposure Response (IER) model used for premature death estimation in previous studies lacked sufficient information on deaths at high  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  exposure, and failed to separate exposure from ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and secondhand smoke, which could potentially introduce uncertainties (Burnett et al., 2014). Our research provides several advances compared to previous studies. First, we quantified the co-benefit of the Air Clean Plan and carbon mitigation measures in China for the environment and health from 2014 to 2020. Second, we used state-of-the-art  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  products with the highest accuracy (Wang et al., 2021; 2022) (Fig. S3 and Fig. S4 for detail) and the finest resolution (spatial resolution of  $1\\mathrm{km}$ , Fig. S2) at the national scale to offer a full-coverage estimation of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths. With these innovations, we not only provided a more accurate estimation of the risk due to exposure to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , but also to analyze the great spatially heterogeneity of policy effectiveness. Third, we adopted the updated MR-BRT spline method, which fits the risk with a more flexible shape for more reliable estimation of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths (Hystad et al., 2020). The MR-BRT includes more exposure scenarios at high  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  levels during fitting compared with other models such as the IER model (Yusuf et al., 2020; Chowdhury et al., 2022). It also excludes active smoking to control for and reduce potential bias due to this effect (Pope et al., 2018). Finally, our study estimated the co-benefit from  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  to the environment and health under the background of the ACP and NDC pledges for the first time.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003897, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical age parameterization validation in Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为研究指出中国大气污染物排放清单的不确定性主要来自排放因子、活动水平和技术分布数据不足，且强调改进这些参数对治理光化学烟雾、酸化和气候变化至关重要。,理由是内容针对排放清单的核心痛点（数据缺陷与政策关联），但未提供具体可深挖的数据集或模型。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission factor uncertainty', 'Regional differentiation', 'Parameter evolution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "the study, particularly outside of the coal-fired power sector, identify specific limitations of available literature and data concerning emission factors, activity levels, and even technology distributions in China. Future regional differentiation of those input parameters will further reduce uncertainties. Improved quantification of emissions of the included species and other, closely associated ones – notably  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$ , generated largely by the same processes and thus subject to many of the same parameter uncertainties – is essential not only for science but for design of policies to redress critical atmospheric environmental hazards at local, regional, and global scales. Among these are photochemical smog, ecosystem acidification, and global climate change. Data collection and analysis of relevant parameters to narrow emission uncertainties, moreover, must be sustained, as these parameters are inevitably evolving as China's rapid growth restructures its economy, transforms its industries, and urbanizes its population."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002945, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为深圳2014-2019年OVOCs来源定量解析：甲醇/MEK以一次人为源为主(47-51%)，丙酮受区域背景主导(37%)，甲酸以二次人为源贡献最大(34%)，模型验证R值达0.71-0.86。,理由是含具体百分比数据和长期观测结果（表2），明确揭示物种差异化来源模式，具备深度挖掘价值。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['source apportionment', 'methanol anthropogenic fraction', 'acetone background contribution']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The parameterization method based on photochemical aging described in section 2.4 was used to analyze the sources of OVOCs during the daytime (8:00-20:00). Referencing the source analysis results for the OVOCs in Shenzhen from 2014 to 2019 (in Table 2), the measured concentrations of six OVOC species monitored by PTR-MS were in good agreement with the simulated concentrations, and the measured values of each OVOC species were highly correlated with the simulated values (R was between 0.71 and 0.86, except for formic acid, which was 0.62). For the six-year average, the sources of methanol and MEK were similar, with the largest contribution from primary anthropogenic sources  $(47 - 51\\%)$  followed by biogenic and background sources. The contributions to acetaldehyde and acetic acid from primary and secondary anthropogenic sources were similar  $(26 - 32\\%)$  followed by biogenic sources (approximately  $20\\%$ ). In contrast to other OVOCs, acetone was the most affected by regional background concentration  $(37\\%)$  which may be because acetone is relatively inactive and widely exists in the atmosphere, and its ground-level background mixing ratios can reach 500 pptv throughout the troposphere under extremely clean conditions (Seinfeld and Pandis, 2016). For formic acid, secondary anthropogenic sources contributed the most  $(34\\%)$'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002899, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Diurnal variation analysis of oxygenated VOCs in source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 10, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2019年深圳OVOCs浓度干季增13%，2015-2019年从30.3ppb降至18.7ppb；人为源贡献占32-51%，污染控制使一次人为源降50-60%但未改善二次生成OVOCs,理由是包含关键数据：长期浓度趋势、季节特征、具体源贡献率及污染控制措施效果，且指出二次污染未受控的核心问题,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['secondary OVOCs formation', 'anthropogenic reduction efficacy', 'photochemical age parameterization']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Oxygenated volatile organic compounds (OVOCs) are important precursors and intermediate products of atmospheric photochemical reactions, which can promote the formation of secondary pollutants such as ozone  $(\\mathrm{O}_3)$  and secondary organic aerosol (SOA). However, there have been few studies on the sources of and long-term variation in ambient OVOCs. This study combined sensitive, near real-time measurements of VOCs by proton transfer reaction-mass spectrometry (PTR-MS) with an improved photochemical age parameterization method to quantify daytime sources of OVOCs in an urban atmosphere in China from 2014 to 2019, permitting the observation of the impacts of emission control strategies that were implemented during this period. Temporal variation in six key OVOCs (methanol, acetaldehyde, acetone, methyl ethyl ketone (MEK), formic acid, and acetic acid) were observed. The sum of concentrations of OVOCs was averagely  $13\\%$  higher during the dry season (November to April), when winds transported polluted air masses to Shenzhen from the continent, than during the wet season, and peak diurnal levels occurred during the daytime year-round due to photochemical production and higher daytime anthropogenic emissions. The average dry season concentration of OVOCs declined from a peak of 30.3 ppb in 2015 to 18.7 ppb in 2019. The results of source apportionment showed that primary anthropogenic sources contributed the most to methanol, MEK, and acetic acid  $(32 - 51\\%)$ ; the dominant sources of acetaldehyde and formic acid were both primary and secondary anthropogenic sources; and biomass burning contributed a small fraction  $(5 - 11\\%)$  to the six OVOCs. From 2014 to 2019, contributions from primary anthropogenic sources of OVOCs decreased significantly by  $50 - 60\\%$  due to intensive pollution control measures in Shenzhen, whereas pollution control measures had no observable impact on secondary OVOCs, indicating their formation was not limited by availability of their primary VOC precursors.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002630, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Multi-receptor model intercomparison for mobile source contribution in northern China'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为2014-2020年中国净化空气计划和碳减排措施显著减少PM2.5暴露，共避免45万早逝；但2020年仍有112万人死于PM2.5污染，占全球27.05%，且清洁生产是高效果措施而区域协同有待提升。,理由是强相关证据：提供PM2.5与健康协同效应的定量评估（具体微克浓度和死亡人数），包含深挖线索（如碳减排贡献26%减排效果），且拥有关键源论文ID（paper_007）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['clean production', 'PM2.5-attributable premature deaths', 'environment and health co-benefits', 'APWBSD phase']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "We provide a comprehensive estimation of the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and the number of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths, as well as spatiotemporal changes in these, and a quantitative assessment of the effectiveness of ACP methods in mainland China during 2014 to 2020. The two key contributions are: (1) We estimated the spatiotemporal variation in the number of deaths attributable to  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  exposure in mainland China during ACP based on the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  product with the finest spatial resolution available to date, and elucidated the spatial discrepancies in policy implementation across China. China's recent clean air actions have achieved great benefits for human health and the environment. However, over  $98\\%$  of the population still lived under the risk of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution ( $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations over  $15\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$ ), with 1.12 million ( $95\\%$  CI: 0.79-1.56) premature deaths caused by  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in mainland China in 2020, accounting for  $\\sim 27.05\\%$  of global ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ -attributable premature deaths. In addition, the environmental and health benefits of China ACP are not fully synergistic in spatial pattern, with the greatest health benefits detected in the YRD region and the best environment benefits identified in the BTH region. To achieve the co-benefits of environment and health, specific policies need to be adopted under different conditions. (2) We quantified the environment and health co-benefits of ACP measures and carbon mitigation from 2014 to 2020. Clean production was the most effective abatement measure in China ACP, reducing net  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and net premature deaths by  $18.35\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  and 0.45 million, respectively. The co-effects of  $\\mathrm{CO}_{2}$  and  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  contributed to a  $23\\%$  and  $26\\%$  decrease in the number of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and premature deaths and became one of the major drivers for  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  and premature deaths reduction in the APWBSD phase. This confirms the clear environment and health co-benefits of carbon mitigation measures. Meanwhile, the effectiveness of process and source control measures reduced during 2018 to 2020. With the exhaustion of end-of-pipe and energy consumption control measures, the future air clean actions should focus more on carbon abatement and energy structure optimization, especially under the background of global climate change mitigation. In addition to mitigation in industrial and energy sectors, it is also critical to explore more cost-effective approaches (e.g., agricultural ammonia mitigation) (Zhou et al., 2021; Gu et al., 2021) for pollution control in other sectors."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003480, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Intercomparison of SPECIATE 4.4 and MEIC database for Asian PM2.5 profiles'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为1999年清华大学首次在北京监测PM2.5，年均浓度115-127μg/m³，证实PM2.5主要来源于二次气溶胶（铵硝酸盐/硫酸盐、有机气溶胶），单一粉尘控制不足以改善污染。,理由是提供中国PM2.5研究早期关键数据，但未包含新深挖线索或可视化元素。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Secondary aerosols', 'Ammonium nitrate sulfate']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'Chinese policymakers took a longer path to recognize issues with  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  pollution in comparison with their response to the acid rain issue. The landmark Harvard Six Cities Study for the eastern United States suggested that ambient fine particle exposures—and not exposures of coarse particle fractions—were specifically associated with daily mortality [11], leading to the first  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  NAAQS being established by the US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) in 1997 [12]. Shortly after, researchers in China began to measure ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations and analyze their chemical composition. A research group at Tsinghua University pioneered the continuous measurement of ambient  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations in Beijing in 1999, and reported annual average values of between 115 and  $127\\mu \\mathrm{g}\\cdot \\mathrm{m}^{-3}$  [13]. As opposed to coarser particles, secondary aerosols (e.g., ammonium nitrate and sulfate, and organic aerosols) rather than primary ones were found to be responsible for the majority of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$ , suggesting that controlling dust emissions alone (which had been ongoing since 1970s) could not sufficiently reduce overall  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentrations.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002913, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical aging parameterization for OVOCs source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第3次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 8, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为本文采用改进的de Gouw光化学老化模型分析OVOCs来源，模型引入$m$和$ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$参数，将OVOCs划分为一次人为源、二次人为源、生物源和区域背景浓度四类来源。,理由是核心模型描述强相关但未展示具体数据结果，需保留作方法背景。Wang/Han/Huang的多次引用增强可信度。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['photochemical-age-based parametric methods', 'primary anthropogenic sources', 'ER_bb']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'photochemical aging developed by de Gouw et al. (2005) has the advantage of not requiring emission inventories and considers the photochemical reactions and consumption processes of OVOCs (Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019, 2020). OVOC concentrations are attributed to primary anthropogenic sources, secondary anthropogenic sources, biogenic sources and the regional-scale background concentrations as described in equation (1), originally proposed by de Gouw et al. (2005), modified here with the addition of terms  $m$  and  $ER_{bb} * [Tracer_{bb}]$  as used in previous studies in this region (Wang et al., 2017, Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019; 2020):'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003910, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 3, 'credibility': 6},认为其内容应该[PRUNE]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为,理由是重复paper_012的方法描述且未补充新数据或结论，信息冗余,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你[]。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'tracked and a detailed Monte-Carlo simulation framework was established, evaluating the uncertainties of emissions from individual plants. At national scale, the uncertainties of emissions of China and Jiangsu were also quantified following the method of our previous work (Zhao et al., 2011). The impacts of various data and methods between multi-scale inventories on the uncertainties of emission estimation are further analyzed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_002904, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Photochemical age parameterization validation in Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei PM2.5 source apportionment'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为深圳PM2.5浓度从2013年40μg/m³降至2019年24μg/m³，但同期臭氧浓度年均增长0.7ppb，成为该地区首要污染物，与高温强光照下光化学反应增强直接相关。,理由是提供具体城市污染物演替数据（含数值趋势）及气候驱动机制，且首次报告OVOCs长期观测。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Ozone-PM2.5 trade-off', 'Photochemical reactivity', 'Long-term OVOC trends']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "Shenzhen is located in China's Pearl River Delta (PRD) urban agglomeration, a region where rapid urbanization and industrialization have led to serious, complex atmospheric pollution (Sin et al., 2001; He et al., 2011). With the implementation of strict environmental protection measures in recent years, the  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  concentration in Shenzhen has decreased significantly. From 2013 to 2019, the average value of  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  in Shenzhen was reduced from 40 to  $24~\\mu \\mathrm{g} / \\mathrm{m}^3$  (Ecological Environment Bureau of Shenzhen Municipality, 2019). However, due to the high temperatures and high solar radiation characteristics of this region, atmospheric photochemical reactions are active, and the concentration of  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  was increasing at an average annual rate of 0.7 ppb from 2014 to 2018 (Wang et al., 2020), such that  $\\mathrm{O_3}$  is replacing  $\\mathrm{PM}_{2.5}$  as the primary atmospheric pollutant in the region (Huang et al., 2019). Several previous short-term studies have observed the diurnal and seasonal patterns of OVOCs and identified their sources in this region (Liu et al., 2008; Liu et al., 2012; Louie et al., 2013; Han et al., 2019; Huang et al., 2019; Zhu et al., 2019); however, this is the first long-term study of OVOCs that permits the observation of interannual variability and long-term changes, in particular those related to emission reduction measures."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003881, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Plant-specific emission factor uncertainty quantification methods'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 7},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为生物质燃烧排放因子的不确定性分析可靠性低，尽管数据符合A/B标准，但存在数据样本不足和系统偏差问题，需更多实地测量。,理由是明确指出现有研究的薄弱环节（生物质燃烧）和研究缺口（实地测量需求），包含具体参考文献（Zhao et al., 2010）可供深挖。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['biomass burning emissions', 'systematic bias', 'uncertainty reliability']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'The situations for emission factors with higher reliability (i.e., A and B) are more complicated. For coal-fired power plants, the data on which the probability distributions for most parameters are fitted are obtained from both thorough field measurements by the authors and published studies by others (see details in Zhao et al., 2010). These support different emission factors across burner types, fuel qualities, and emission control levels. The uncertainty analysis for this sector are thus the most reliable in this study. Such confidence, however, does not apply to the residential sector, particularly biomass burning, even though the emission factors meet A or B criteria. As discussed in Sect. 4.1, the data on which the distributions are based are limited in number and systematic bias may result in this sector. In other words, the reliability of uncertainty analysis of biomass burning is in fact poor despite the statistical strength of data fitting. Given its high contributions to uncertainties in emission estimates, more field measurements of emissions from biomass burning in China are urgently needed.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003907, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Multi-receptor model intercomparison for mobile source contribution in northern China'}。
                        本次是第1次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 9},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为中国主要排放清单（INTEX-B/EDGAR/REAS/MEIC）的差异源于方法和数据源，能源统计不确定性大于预期，需蒙特卡洛模拟优化。,理由是核心综述性内容，覆盖多个权威清单并指出能源统计的理论缺陷，提供多篇关键文献索引（如Zhang/Ohara/Kurokawa等）。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['MEIC', 'EDGAR', 'REAS', 'energy statistics uncertainty']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': "making in pollution mitigation. Recently the focus on China's emissions is in particular rising, as the country contains a wide variety of emissions sources, relatively large emission intensities, and fast changes in temporal and spatial patterns of emissions, attributed to the swift growth of economy and to the multiple measures of emission controls. At continental/national scale, various inventories have been developed including the one for Intercontinental Chemical Transport Experiment-Phase B (INTEX-B, Zhang et al., 2009), the Emissions Database for Global Atmospheric Research (EDGAR, JRC/PBL, 2011), the Regional Emission inventory in Asia (REAS, Ohara et al., 2007; Kurokawa et al., 2013), and the Multi-resolution Emission Inventory for China (MEIC, http://www.meicmodel.org/). Resulting from different methods and data sources, discrepancies existed between inventories and the model performances varied significantly when they were applied in CTM (Saikawa et al., 2017), motivating the uncertainty analysis of current inventories. Compared to earlier studies based mainly on expert judgment (Streets et al., 2003; Zhang et al., 2009; Lei et al., 2011a), Monte-Carlo simulation have been applied to quantify the uncertainties of emissions more carefully, and reduced uncertainty could be expected (Zhao et al., 2011, 2013; Lu et al., 2011). In those studies, emission factors (emissions per unit of energy consumption or industrial/agricultural production) were the main sources of uncertainties attributed mainly to lack of domestic measurements on various sources. However, recent studies suggested that the uncertainty of China's energy statistics should be larger than expected, enhancing the uncertainty of emission estimation for the country (Guan et al., 2012; Hong et al., 2017)."}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003884, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Bayesian integration methods for PM2.5 source apportionment uncertainty'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 7, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[KEEP]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为蒙特卡洛模拟中假设同类别排放源排放因子相同会高估不确定性，忽略了实际排放特征的多样性。,理由是指出排放因子假设的系统性偏差，但未提供具体改进方案或数据线索,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['emission factor heterogeneity', 'uncertainty overestimation']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'As described above, the uncertainty analysis in this study are based on sector (or sub-sector) estimates, i.e., the emission factors for all plants in a given emission source category are assumed to be identical for the Monte Carlo simulations. That assumption, however, is hardly realistic, as the complexity and diversity of emission characteristics for a given source category will lead to differences in practice. This approach might therefore overestimate somewhat the uncertainties of emissions.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003994, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'Statistical representativeness improvement methods for mobile source emission factors'}。
                        本次是第2次检索到, 评估人员已评估，评估分数为{'relevance': 9, 'credibility': 8},认为其内容应该[GROW]。
                        具体而言评估人员总结条目内容为证据识别排放因子不确定性是工业源清单的主要瓶颈，并强调基于工厂数据和现场测量的需求来提高地方尺度排放估算精度。,理由是高价值证据，为计算不确定性问题提供解决方案线索，如引述plant-based方法和需求更多调查。,他抽取处理一些关键词推荐给你['Emission factor uncertainty', 'Plant-based method']。
                        这个条目的具体内容是: {'text': 'information on emission factors was identified to be crucial for the uncertainties of emissions for those source categories. The results indicated the importance of better understanding on emission characteristics of individual plants when emission inventory was developed using a "plant-based" method. Such experience could be extended to other regions/cities with similar economic and industrial structures. Due to lack of sufficient field measurements, however, the plant-specific emission factors for all species were still unavailable at local spatial scale for other industrial sources, and technology-based emission factors had to be assigned for all the plants of the same manufacturing technology types, without independent uncertainty assumptions. Moreover, the uncertainty analysis for sectors other than industry at provincial and city scales could hardly be improved, as data from current available statistics or investigations could not better differentiate the emission characteristics by source type or provide detailed information on errors of activity data and emission factors. Those limitations motivated more detailed on-site investigations and field measurements on typical emission sources for further improving the emission estimates at local scales.'}, 来自论文ID: None, 关键词: None

                        --------------------------------------------------
证据节点ID: chunk_003483, 选择了strategy_semantic_search工具, 工具参数为{'query_intent': 'What are the main methods and techniques for PM2.5 source apportionment?'}。
